definitionZh: v  取消， 废除； 删去， 删除； 抵消
definitionEn: to decide that something that was officially planned will not happen
example: Our flight was cancelled.

definitionZh: v  向后倚靠， 斜倚
definitionEn: to lie or lean back in a relaxed way
example: She proceeded to recline on a chaise longue.

definitionZh: adj 爆炸的，爆发的；使人冲动的; n  炸药
definitionEn: able or likely to explode; a substance that can cause an explosion
example: Because the gas is highly explosive, it needs to be kept in high-pressure containers.

definitionZh: v  准备， 预备
definitionEn: to make plans or arrangements for something that will happen in the future
example: The prosecution wanted more time to prepare their case.

definitionZh: v  加入十字军， 投身正义运动; n 十字军；斗争，运动
definitionEn: to take part in a crusade; a determined attempt to change something because you think you are morally right

definitionZh: vt  取代， 代替
definitionEn: to take the place of a person or thing so that they are no longer used, no longer in a position of power etc
example: Barker was soon supplanted as party leader.

definitionZh: n  外科医师
definitionEn: a doctor who does operations in a hospital
example: ...a heart surgeon.

definitionZh: adj  突然的， 意外的； 唐突的， 鲁莽的
definitionEn: sudden and unexpected
example: an abrupt change of plan

definitionZh: vt  使泄气， 使灰心； 阻止， 劝阻
definitionEn: to make someone less confident or less willing to do something
example: You should not let one failure discourage you.

definitionZh: v  事先影响某人； 易受感染
example: They take pains to hire people whose personalities predispose them to serve customers well.

definitionZh: adj  自发的， 自然产生的； 自然的， 无雕饰的
definitionEn: something that is spontaneous has not been planned or organized, but happens by itself, or because you suddenly feel you want to do it
example: The crowd gave a spontaneous cheer.

definitionZh: n  对流； 传送
definitionEn: the movement in a gas or liquid caused by warm gas or liquid rising, and cold gas or liquid sinking
example: ...clouds which lift warm, moist air by convection high into the atmosphere.

definitionZh: vt 使失事；破坏; n  沉船； 失事
definitionEn: to completely spoil something so that it cannot continue in a successful way; a ship that has sunk
example: Injury threatened to wreck his sporting career.

definitionZh: adj  闪光的; n 瞬间，一眨眼
definitionEn: very quickly
example: On a clear night, I could see stars twinkling in the sky.

definitionZh: adj  忧郁的， 令人沮丧的； 昏暗的， 阴暗的， 阴沉的
definitionEn: making you feel that things will not improve
example: The report paints a gloomy picture of the economy.

definitionZh: v&n  指责， 斥责， 批评
definitionEn: criticism, blame, or disapproval
example: ‘You don’t need me,’ she said quietly, without reproach.

definitionZh: n  关税， 进口税； 海关
definitionEn: Customs is the official organization responsible for collecting taxes on goods coming into a country and preventing illegal goods from being brought in
example: What right does Customs have to search my car?

definitionZh: n 授权，批准；许可证；委任状，执行令; vt  保证， 担保； 使正当
definitionEn: a legal document that is signed by a judge, allowing the police to take a particular action; to promise that something is true
example: The company issued warrants for 300,000 shares.

definitionZh: n  缘故， 理由； 好处
example: He moved to the seaside for the sake of his health.

definitionZh: vt  隐蔽； 隐瞒； 覆盖
definitionEn: to hide something carefully
example: The shadows concealed her as she crept up to the house.

definitionZh: adj 固体的；实心的；结实的，稳固的；可靠的；连续的; n  固体
definitionEn: hard or firm, with a fixed shape, and not a liquid or gas; a firm object or substance that has a fixed shape, not a gas or liquid
example: The lake was frozen solid .

definitionZh: adj  叙述性的; n 叙述；记叙体，叙述技巧
definitionEn: a description of events in a story, especially in a novel
example: The novel contains more narrative than dialogue.

definitionZh: vi  同时发生； 一致， 相符； 重合
definitionEn: to happen at the same time as something else, especially by chance
example: When our vacations coincided, we often holidayed together.

definitionZh: adj  圆形的， 环形的； 循环的； 绕行的
definitionEn: shaped like a circle
example: a circular table

definitionZh: vt 刮擦，划；抓，搔; n  划痕； 挠痒
definitionEn: to rub your skin with your nails because it feels uncomfortable; a small cut on someone’s skin
example: John yawned and scratched his leg.

definitionZh: vt  需要； 要求， 命令
definitionEn: to need something
example: Campbell’s broken leg will probably require surgery.

definitionZh: adj 合作的，协作的；配合的; n  合作企业
definitionEn: willing to cooperate; a business or organization owned equally by all the people working there
example: He was doing his best to be cooperative.

definitionZh: n  柳， 柳树； 柳木制品
definitionEn: a type of tree that has long thin branches and grows near water, or the wood from this tree

definitionZh: adj  肉体的， 身体的； 物质的； 实体的
definitionEn: relating to the body, rather than to the mind, feelings, or spirit
example: corporeal desires

definitionZh: adj  急躁的， 易怒的； 易受刺激的； 过敏的
definitionEn: getting annoyed quickly or easily
example: Jo was tired, irritable, and depressed.

definitionZh: v 增至三倍; adj  三部分的； 三方的； 三倍的
definitionEn: to increase by three times as much, or to make something do this; having three parts or involving three groups, people, events etc
example: The company has tripled in size .

definitionZh: n 脾气，性情; vt  缓和， 调节
definitionEn: a tendency to become angry suddenly or easily; to make something less severe or extreme
example: That temper of hers will get her into trouble one of these days.

definitionZh: adj  清楚的； 易读的
definitionEn: written or printed clearly enough for you to read
example: Her handwriting was so tiny it was barely legible.

definitionZh: v 发痒；使高兴，逗乐; n  痒
definitionEn: if something touching your body tickles you, it makes you want to rub your body because it is slightly uncomfortable; a feeling in your throat that makes you want to cough
example: Mommy, this blanket tickles.

definitionZh: adj  心脏的； 心脏病的
definitionEn: relating to the heart
example: cardiac surgery

definitionZh: adj  易接近的； 可得到的； 可进入的
definitionEn: a place, building, or object that is accessible is easy to reach or get into
example: The island is only accessible by boat.

definitionZh: n  年龄歧视
definitionEn: unfair treatment of people because they are old
example: The problem of ageism in the workplace often goes unrecognized.

definitionZh: n  悬崖， 峭壁
definitionEn: a large area of rock or a mountain with a very steep side, often at the edge of the sea or a river
example: The car rolled over the edge of a cliff.

definitionZh: v 滚动，转动；卷，绕；摇摆，摇晃; n  卷； 卷形物； 名单， 花名册
definitionEn: if something rolls, especially something round, or if you roll it, it moves along a surface by turning over and over; a piece of paper, camera film, money etc that has been rolled into the shape of a tube
example: His sleeves were rolled above his elbows.

definitionZh: adj 值得注意的，明显的；显著的；著名的；重要的; n  名人， 要人
definitionEn: important, interesting, excellent, or unusual enough to be noticed or mentioned
example: Every country in the world signed the treaty, with one notable exception - the United States.

definitionZh: v  承认； 让步； 允许
definitionEn: to admit that something is true or correct, although you wish it were not true
example: ‘That’s the only possible solution.’ ‘Yes, I suppose so,’ Charles conceded.

definitionZh: adj  空前的， 无比的
definitionEn: bigger, better, or worse than anything else
example: an achievement unparalleled in sporting history

definitionZh: v  蒸发； 消失， 不复存在
definitionEn: if a liquid evaporates, or if heat evaporates it, it changes into a gas
example: Most of the water had evaporated.

definitionZh: n  亮度， 发光度； 光明
definitionEn: The luminosity of a star or sun is how bright it is
example: For a few years its luminosity flared up to about 10,000 times the present-day luminosity of the Sun.

definitionZh: n 授权，委任；委员会；佣金，回扣; vt  委托， 授权
definitionEn: a group of people who have been given the official job of finding out about something or controlling something; to formally ask someone to write an official report, produce a work of art for you etc
example: The Government set up a commission to investigate allegations of police violence.

definitionZh: n  政策， 方针； 原则； 保险单
definitionEn: a way of doing something that has been officially agreed and chosen by a political party, a business, or another organization
example: an insurance policy

definitionZh: v  重新开始， 继续
definitionEn: to start doing something again after stopping or being interrupted
example: She hopes to resume work after the baby is born.

definitionZh: adj  挑衅的， 煽动性的； 惹人讨厌的； 挑逗的
definitionEn: provocative behaviour, remarks etc are intended to make people angry or upset, or to cause a lot of discussion
example: a provocative act by a terrorist group

definitionZh: v  作讲话； 写姓名地址; n 地址；讲话
definitionEn: if you address an envelope, package etc, you write on it the name and address of the person you are sending it to; the details of the place where someone lives or works, which you use to send them letters etc
example: Send a stamped, self-addressed envelope (=  with your address on it so it can be sent back to you  ) .

definitionZh: vi 盘旋；盘旋上升；急剧增长; adj 螺旋形的; n  螺旋形； 螺旋式的上升
definitionEn: to move in a continuous curve that gets nearer to or further from its central point as it goes round; Spiral is also an adjective; a line in the form of a curve that winds around a central point, moving further away from the centre all the time
example: Crime has spiraled out of control .

definitionZh: adj  艺术的； 富有艺术性的， 精美的； 有艺术天赋的
definitionEn: relating to art or culture
example: artistic work

definitionZh: vi 漫游；漫谈，闲聊; n  漫步
definitionEn: to go on a walk in the countryside for pleasure; a walk in the countryside for pleasure
example: There’s plenty to discover as you ramble around this little island.

definitionZh: n  职业； 使命感； 圣召
definitionEn: a strong belief that you have been chosen by God to be a priest or a nun
example: It could well be that he has a real vocation.

definitionZh: v  停住， 停下; n 停止，阻止；暂停
definitionEn: to stop moving; a stop or pause
example: The parade halted by a busy corner.

definitionZh: v 投，掷，抛；丢，扔；使陷入，使处于；使困惑，使吃惊; n  投， 掷， 抛； 投掷的距离
definitionEn: to make an object such as a ball move quickly through the air by pushing your hand forward quickly and letting the object go; an action in which someone throws something
example: The bus stopped suddenly and we were all thrown forwards.

definitionZh: n  日落， 傍晚
definitionEn: the time of day when the sun disappears and night begins
example: a glorious sunset

definitionZh: n  身材， 身高； 地位， 声望， 名望
definitionEn: the degree to which someone is admired or regarded as important
example: He grew in stature (= became more admired or popular ) during the campaign.

definitionZh: adj  顽强的， 坚持不懈的； 顽固的， 固执的
definitionEn: dogged behaviour shows that you are very determined to continue doing something
example: a dogged determination to succeed

definitionZh: n  血浆； 等离子体
definitionEn: the yellowish liquid part of blood that contains the blood cells
example: Now there are no gaps, so this is the state of matter, and this was the state of a plasma.

definitionZh: adj  过高的， 不合理的
definitionEn: an exorbitant price, amount of money etc is much higher than it should be
example: Exorbitant housing prices have created an acute shortage of affordable housing for the poor.

definitionZh: n  外科手术； 外科学； 手术室， 诊疗室
definitionEn: medical treatment in which a surgeon cuts open your body to repair or remove something inside
example: Dr. Hanson is in surgery.

definitionZh: adj  暴力的； 感情强烈的， 激情的； 强烈的， 激烈的
definitionEn: involving actions that are intended to injure or kill people, by hitting them, shooting them etc
example: the increase in violent crime

definitionZh: adj  难达到的， 不可及的； 不能得到的
definitionEn: difficult or impossible to reach
example: In winter, the villages are inaccessible by road.

definitionZh: v 解决；决定，决心；分解；显现; n  决心， 决议
definitionEn: to find a satisfactory way of dealing with a problem or difficulty; strong determination to succeed in doing something
example: Barnet was desperate for money to resolve his financial problems.

definitionZh: v  设计舞蹈动作， 编舞
definitionEn: to arrange how dancers should move during a performance
example: The show is very cleverly choreographed.

definitionZh: vt  使面临， 使遭遇； 对抗
definitionEn: if a problem, difficulty etc confronts you, it appears and needs to be dealt with
example: The problems confronting the new government were enormous.

definitionZh: adj  非语言的
definitionEn: not using words
example: nonverbal forms of communication

definitionZh: vt  部署， 调度； 利用
definitionEn: to organize or move soldiers, military equipment etc so that they are in the right place and ready to be used
example: a job in which a variety of professional skills will be deployed

definitionZh: v  繁殖， 生育； 复制； 再现
definitionEn: if an animal or plant reproduces, or reproduces itself, it produces young plants or animals
example: The turtles return to the coast to reproduce.

definitionZh: n  梗概， 提纲； 骨架， 骨骼； 框架
definitionEn: the most important parts of something, to which more detail can be added later
example: We agreed on a skeleton outline of the proposal.

definitionZh: vi  聚集在一起， 挤作一团； 蜷缩， 缩成一团， 蜷缩; n 挤在一起的人
definitionEn: if a group of people huddle together, they stay very close to each other, especially because they are cold or frightened; a group of people or things that are close together, but not arranged in any particular order, pattern, or system
example: We lay huddled together for warmth.

definitionZh: adj  句法的； 按照句法的
definitionEn: relating to syntax
example: syntactic structure

definitionZh: n  表演， 演唱； 提供， 给予； 翻译
definitionEn: someone’s performance of a play, piece of music etc
example: He gave a moving rendition of Lennon’s ‘Imagine’.

definitionZh: n  交点； 十字路口， 道路交叉口
definitionEn: a place where roads, lines etc cross each other, especially where two roads meet
example: We crossed at a busy intersection.

definitionZh: n  奖学金； 学问， 学识
definitionEn: an amount of money that is given to someone by an educational organization to help pay for their education
example: Her latest publication is a fine piece of scholarship.

definitionZh: adj  无数的； 大量的; n 无数；大量
definitionEn: very many; a very large number of things
example: the myriad causes of homelessness

definitionZh: adv  而且， 还有; prep 除…之外
definitionEn: used when adding another reason
example: I need the money. And besides, when I agree to do something, I do it.

definitionZh: vt  使生效， 执行， 实施
definitionEn: to take action or make changes that you have officially decided should happen
example: The government promised to implement a new system to control financial loan institutions.

definitionZh: v  分散， 散开； 疏散； 散布
definitionEn: if a group of people disperse or are dispersed, they go away in different directions
example: Police used tear gas to disperse the crowd.

definitionZh: adj  古怪的， 反复无常的； 不规则的； 不稳定的
definitionEn: something that is erratic does not follow any pattern or plan but happens in a way that is not regular
example: His breathing was becoming erratic.

definitionZh: vt  焚化， 焚毁
example: Which is better to incinerate the rubbish from our towns or to tip it into disused quarries?

definitionZh: n  想象， 幻想
definitionEn: an exciting and unusual experience or situation you imagine happening to you, but which will probably never happen
example: I used to have fantasies about living in Paris with an artist.

definitionZh: adj  毛状的； 毛细血管的; n 毛细血管
definitionEn: the smallest type of  blood vessel (= tube carrying blood )  in the body
example: This consists of a capillary connected to a mercury reservoir.

definitionZh: v  变形
definitionEn: if you deform something, or if it deforms, its usual shape changes so that its usefulness or appearance is spoiled
example: Wearing badly-fitting shoes can deform your feet.

definitionZh: v  侵蚀， 腐蚀
definitionEn: if the weather erodes rock or soil, or if rock or soil erodes, its surface is gradually destroyed
example: The cliffs are being constantly eroded by heavy seas.

definitionZh: adj  提供消息的， 给予知识的； 见闻广博的
definitionEn: Something that is informative gives you useful information
example: Both men termed the meeting friendly and informative.

definitionZh: n 支票；账单；
definitionEn: the American spelling of  cheque
example: Can you cash this check for me?

definitionZh: vt  使感到灰心， 挫败； 阻止
definitionEn: to prevent someone’s plans, efforts, or attempts from succeeding
example: Their attempts to speak to him were frustrated by the guards.

definitionZh: adj  稀疏的， 稀少的； 贫乏的
definitionEn: existing only in small amounts
example: his sparse brown hair

definitionZh: adj  漂亮的； 令人愉快的； 华丽的， 灿烂的
definitionEn: extremely pleasant or enjoyable
example: a gorgeous cake

definitionZh: adj  务实的， 注重实效的， 实用的
definitionEn: dealing with problems in a sensible practical way instead of strictly following a set of ideas
example: Williams took a more pragmatic approach to management problems.

definitionZh: n  腐蚀， 侵蚀； 削弱， 减少
definitionEn: the process by which rock or soil is gradually destroyed by wind, rain, or the sea
example: the problem of soil erosion

definitionZh: n  甲烷， 沼气
definitionEn: a gas that you cannot see or smell, which can be burned to give heat
example: Methane is one of the principal gases contributing to the greenhouse effect.

definitionZh: adj  地壳构造的
definitionEn: relating to  plate tectonics
example: tectonic movements

definitionZh: adj  迷信的， 受迷信思想支配的
definitionEn: influenced by superstitions
example: a superstitious woman

definitionZh: v  上升， 升高； 攀登
definitionEn: to move up through the air
example: The plane ascended rapidly.

definitionZh: n  弹力； 弹性
definitionEn: the ability of something to stretch and go back to its usual length or size
example: the skin’s natural elasticity

definitionZh: adj  积极主动的； 先发制人的
definitionEn: making things happen or change rather than reacting to events
example: a proactive approach to staffing requirements

definitionZh: adj 原始的；土著的，土生土长的; n  土著
definitionEn: relating to the people or animals that have existed in a place or country from the earliest times; an aborigine
example: ...Aboriginal art.

definitionZh: adj  必不可少的
definitionEn: someone or something that is indispensable is so important or useful that it is impossible to manage without them
example: Mobile phones have become an indispensable part of our lives.

definitionZh: n  透镜； 镜头； 镜片
definitionEn: the part of a camera through which the light travels before it reaches the film
example: a standard 50mm lens

definitionZh: vt  表达， 体现； 含有
definitionEn: to be a very good example of an idea or quality
example: She embodies everything I admire in a teacher.

definitionZh: adj  可证实的， 可核实的
definitionEn: Something that is verifiable can be proved to be true or genuine
example: This is not a romantic notion but verifiable fact.

definitionZh: adj  可理解的， 能懂的， 能充分理解的
definitionEn: easy to understand
example: Her speech was slurred and barely comprehensible.

definitionZh: adj  发动的； 导致运动的; n 动机，目的
definitionEn: the motive power or force for a machine, vehicle etc makes it move; the reason that makes someone do something, especially when this reason is kept hidden
example: Water provided the motive power for the mill.

definitionZh: adj  椭圆的； 隐晦的； 省略的， 简略的
definitionEn: having the shape of an ellipse
example: Kepler published his discovery of the elliptical orbits of planets in 1609. 1609

definitionZh: vt  解放， 解除
definitionEn: to give someone the political or legal rights that they did not have before
example: Slaves were emancipated in 1834.

definitionZh: adj  爱情的； 浪漫的， 富有情调的； 多情的； 不切实际的， 幻想的； [R-]浪漫主义的
definitionEn: showing strong feelings of love
example: ‘Tom always sends me red roses on my birthday.’ ‘How romantic!’

definitionZh: vt  激励； 激发
definitionEn: to make someone want to achieve something and make them willing to work hard in order to do this
example: A good teacher has to be able to motivate her students.

definitionZh: v  破坏； 宠坏， 溺爱； 变质
definitionEn: to give a child everything they want, or let them do whatever they want, often with the result that they behave badly
example: She’s an only child, but they didn’t really spoil her.

definitionZh: v  增加； 繁殖； 乘
definitionEn: to breed
example: Bacteria multiply quickly in warm food.

definitionZh: n 牧场，草原；
definitionEn: land or a field that is covered with grass and is used for cattle, sheep etc to feed on
example: large areas of rough upland pasture

definitionZh: adj  有助于…的， 有益于…的
definitionEn: if a situation is conducive to something such as work, rest etc, it provides conditions that make it easy for you to work etc
example: an environment conducive to learning

definitionZh: adj 试验性的; n 飞行员，领航员；领导人; vt  驾驶， 领航； 试行， 试用； 使通过， 引导
definitionEn: A pilot plan or a pilot project is one that is used to test an idea before deciding whether to introduce it on a larger scale; someone who operates the controls of an aircraft or spacecraft; to test a new idea, product etc on people to find out whether it will be successful
example: The plan is to launch a pilot programme next summer.

definitionZh: adj 有助于治疗的，有疗效的; n  药物
definitionEn: able to or intended to cure illness
example: the spring’s alleged curative properties

definitionZh: n  软骨
definitionEn: a strong substance that can bend, which is around the joints in your body and in your outer ear
example: Andre Agassi has pulled out of next week's Grand Slam Cup after tearing a cartilage in his chest.

definitionZh: adj  伪造的； 不诚实的； 讽刺的， 挖苦的， 含沙射影的
definitionEn: if you say something snide, you say something unkind, often in a clever, indirect way
example: He made a snide comment about her weight.

definitionZh: adj 多样的；多重的; n  倍数
definitionEn: many, or involving many things, people, events etc; a number that contains a smaller number an exact number of times
example: Baxter was rushed to the hospital with multiple stab wounds.

definitionZh: vt  暴露， 显露； 揭露， 揭穿； 使接触， 使面临
definitionEn: to show something that is usually covered or hidden
example: He lifted his T-shirt to expose a jagged scar across his chest.

definitionZh: n  磁铁， 磁体； 有吸引力的人
definitionEn: a piece of iron or steel that can stick to metal or make other metal objects move towards itself
example: Prospect Park, with its vast lake, is a magnet for all health freaks.

definitionZh: adj  多才多艺的； 多用途的
definitionEn: someone who is versatile has many different skills
example: a very versatile performer

definitionZh: v 集中，专心；
definitionEn: to think very carefully about something that you are doing
example: Now please concentrate.

definitionZh: prep  对， 对抗； 与…相对， 与…相比
definitionEn: used to show that two people or teams are competing against each other in a game or court case
example: the New York Knicks versus the LA Lakers

definitionZh: n  书法
definitionEn: the art of writing by hand, or skill in this art
example: children practicing their penmanship

definitionZh: n  苔原， 冻原， 冻土地带
definitionEn: the large flat areas of land in the north of Russia, Canada etc, where it is very cold and there are no trees
example: Gley soils are typical of tundra , meadows, and boggy areas.

definitionZh: n  爆炸； 爆发； 激增
definitionEn: a loud sound and the energy produced by something such as a bomb bursting into small pieces
example: We heard a loud explosion.

definitionZh: vi 做焊锅匠；做拙劣修补; n  补锅匠
definitionEn: in the past, a tinker was someone who travelled from place to place selling things or repairing metal pots, pans etc
example: Arcane nullifiers recognize Common, but only an experienced tinker, shouting out the correct codes, may command them.

definitionZh: vt  居住于
definitionEn: if an area is populated by a particular group of people, they live there
example: The highlands are populated mainly by peasant farmers.

definitionZh: v 刺穿；泄气，挫伤; n  小孔； 刺伤
definitionEn: if a tyre punctures, or if you puncture it, a small hole appears in it; a small hole made accidentally in a tyre
example: A piece of glass punctured the back tyre.

definitionZh: v  允许， 许可; n  许可证， 执照
definitionEn: to allow something to happen, especially by an official decision, rule, or law; an official written statement giving you the right to do something
example: Smoking is only permitted in the public lounge.

definitionZh: n  翻译； 译文， 译本
definitionEn: when you translate something, or something that has been translated
example: She read the letter and gave us a rough translation (= she did not translate everything exactly ) .

definitionZh: n  全体人员， 员工
definitionEn: the people who work in a company, organization, or military force
example: All personnel are to receive security badges.

definitionZh: v  溅， 泼; n 重点文章；溅上的液体；斑点
definitionEn: if a liquid splashes, it hits or falls on something and makes a noise; a mark made by a liquid splashing onto something else
example: The children were splashing about in the pool.

definitionZh: n  喷泉； 丰富来源， 源泉
definitionEn: A fountain is an ornamental feature in a pool or lake which consists of a long narrow stream of water that is forced up into the air by a pump
example: ...the fountains on the 16th Street Mall.

definitionZh: n  瓷器， 瓷
definitionEn: a hard shiny white substance that is used for making expensive plates, cups etc
example: a porcelain vase

definitionZh: n  目录
example: Can you catalog all these books?

definitionZh: adj  兼职的； 部分时间的
definitionEn: someone who has a part-time job works for only part of each day or week
example: a part-time job

definitionZh: vt 开拓，开创; n  开拓者， 创始人
definitionEn: to be the first person to do, invent or use something; someone who is important in the early development of something, and whose work or ideas are later developed by other people
example: The new cancer treatment was pioneered in the early eighties by Dr Sylvia Bannerjee.

definitionZh: adj  寒冷的； 冷淡的， 不友好的
definitionEn: chilly weather or places are cold enough to make you feel uncomfortable
example: Getting chilly, isn’t it?

definitionZh: n [昆] 鞭毛；鞭子；鞭状匍匐枝
definitionEn: a long whiplike outgrowth from a cell that acts as an organ of locomotion: occurs in some protozoans, gametes, spores, etc

definitionZh: n  犀牛
definitionEn: a large heavy African or Asian animal with thick skin and either one or two horns on its nose
example: Some of the projects will also support conservation efforts of near-extinct animals in Kalimantan, including rhinoceros, Irrawaddy dolphins, and orangutans.

definitionZh: n  含义； 暗示， 暗指； 卷入， 牵连
definitionEn: a situation in which it is shown or suggested that someone or something is involved in a crime or a dishonest act
example: They are called ‘Supertrams’, the implication being that (= which is meant to suggest that ) they are more advanced than earlier models.

definitionZh: adj  凶猛的， 残忍的； 狂热的， 强烈的； 激烈的， 猛烈的
definitionEn: done with a lot of energy and strong feelings, and sometimes violence
example: fierce fighting in the city

definitionZh: n  预约， 预订； 保留意见， 疑惑； 居留地
definitionEn: an arrangement which you make so that a place in a hotel, restaurant, plane etc is kept for you at a particular time in the future
example: a dinner reservation

definitionZh: vt 阻塞；阻碍，妨碍; n  大块； 街区； 障碍物
definitionEn: to prevent anything moving through a space by being or placing something across it or in it; a piece of hard material such as wood or stone with straight sides
example: A fallen tree is blocking the road.

definitionZh: adj  亲切的， 热诚的
definitionEn: friendly but quite polite and formal
example: The talks were conducted in a cordial atmosphere.

definitionZh: adj  有气味的， 难闻的； 香的， 芬芳的
definitionEn: having a smell
example: odorous gases

definitionZh: n  合作， 协作
definitionEn: when you work with someone to achieve something that you both want
example: the need to strengthen international co-operation

definitionZh: n  自负， 自大
definitionEn: an attitude that shows you have too high an opinion of your own abilities or importance
example: The conceit of the woman!

definitionZh: v  调整， 调节； 调制
definitionEn: to change the sound of your voice
example: These drugs modulate the disease process.

definitionZh: adj  有杂色的， 斑驳的
definitionEn: covered with spots or coloured areas
example: His red, mottled face showed the effect of too much whisky.

definitionZh: n  形态学， 形态论
definitionEn: the study of the  morpheme s  of a language and of the way in which they are joined together to make words
example: Morpheme is the basic unit in the study of morphology.

definitionZh: adj  远离的， 遥远的； 疏远的， 冷淡的； 久远的； 不同的
definitionEn: far away in space or time
example: the sound of distant gunfire

definitionZh: n  共振， 共鸣； 回声， 反响
definitionEn: the special meaning or importance that something has for you because it relates to your own experiences
example: a tradition that has little resonance in the 21st century

definitionZh: v  建议， 提议； 提名， 推荐； 打算， 计划； 求婚
definitionEn: to suggest something as a plan or course of action
example: the changes currently proposed by the local planning authorities

definitionZh: n 先锋，前锋，先头部队; vt  为…作先锋； 带头做
definitionEn: a person or group of people who lead an attack or organized action; to lead an attack or organized action
example: the troops who spearheaded the rescue mission

definitionZh: n  地震仪， 测震仪
definitionEn: an instrument that measures and records the movement of the earth during an  earthquake
example: On the right waist have a seismograph, it tender prior to the earthquake forecast the earthquake.

definitionZh: n&v  改革， 改造， 革新； 改正， 改过自新
definitionEn: to improve a system, law, organization etc by making a lot of changes to it, so that it operates in a fairer or more effective way
example: plans to radically reform the tax system

definitionZh: adj  有角的， 尖角的； 消瘦的， 瘦骨嶙峋的
definitionEn: thin and not having much flesh on your bones
example: a tall, angular young man

definitionZh: n  日光； 白昼
definitionEn: the light produced by the sun during the day
example: The park is open to the public during daylight hours .

definitionZh: n  讲坛， 讲台； 指挥台
definitionEn: a small raised area for a performer, speaker, or musical  conductor  to stand on
example: Unsteadily he mounted the podium, adjusted the microphone, coughed, and went completely blank.

definitionZh: adj  二进制的； 二元的； 由两部分组成的
definitionEn: a system of counting, used in computers, in which only the numbers 0 and 1 are used
example: a binary star system

definitionZh: vi  继而发生， 接着发生
definitionEn: to happen after or as a result of something
example: If the Europeans did not reduce subsidies, a trade war would ensue.

definitionZh: adj  疯狂的， 不理智的； 狂热的， 热衷的； 精神失常的
definitionEn: very strange or not sensible
example: The neighbours must think we’re crazy.

definitionZh: adj  用显微镜可见的； 极小的
definitionEn: extremely small and therefore very difficult to see
example: a microscopic speck of dust

definitionZh: n  尊敬， 敬意
definitionEn: something you do to show respect for someone or something you think is important
example: The film pays homage to Martin Scorsese’s ‘Mean Streets’.

definitionZh: n  青霉素， 盘尼西林
definitionEn: a type of medicine that is used to treat infections caused by  bacteria

definitionZh: vi  憔悴； 难过， 悲伤; n 松树
definitionEn: to become sad and not continue your life as normal because someone has died or gone away; a tall tree with long hard sharp leaves that do not fall off in winter
example: Six months after he left, she was still pining.

definitionZh: n  启发， 教化， 启迪； [the E-]启蒙运动
definitionEn: Enlightenment means the act of enlightening or the state of being enlightened
example: Stella had a moment of enlightenment.

definitionZh: n  反话， 讽刺， 嘲弄； 具有讽刺意味的事
definitionEn: a situation that is unusual or amusing because something strange happens, or the opposite of what is expected happens or is true
example: Life is full of little ironies.

definitionZh: n 强制的，法定的，义务的； 受托人； 代理人
n  毛毛虫
definitionEn: a small creature like a  worm  with many legs that eats leaves and that develops into a  butterfly  or other flying insect
example: I saw a caterpillar on the leaf.

definitionZh: n  超文本
definitionEn: a way of writing computer documents that makes it possible to move from one document to another by  clicking  on words or pictures, especially on the Internet
example: ...information embroidered with colourful graphics and tied together by hypertext links.

definitionZh: n  基础， 根基； 基岩
definitionEn: the basic ideas, features, or facts on which something is based
example: Marriage and children are the bedrock of family life.

definitionZh: n  综合征； 典型表现
definitionEn: an illness which consists of a set of physical or mental problems – often used in the name of illnesses
example: people who suffer from irritable bowel syndrome

definitionZh: n  新闻纸
definitionEn: cheap paper used mostly for printing newspapers on
example: ...a newsprint warehouse.

definitionZh: vt&n  拖， 牵引
definitionEn: to pull a vehicle or ship along behind another vehicle, using a rope or chain
example: The ship had to be towed into the harbor.

definitionZh: n 泛音；
example: And the researchers say our brains might like these chords because their frequencies resemble those of a single harmonic note.

definitionZh: v 拖，拖运; n  拖， 拉， 拖运； 一次获得的数量； 旅行的距离
definitionEn: to pull something heavy with a continuous steady movement; the amount of fish caught when fishing with a net
example: the steam locomotive which hauled the train

definitionZh: adj  精力充沛的， 积极的
definitionEn: having or needing a lot of energy or determination
example: an energetic man

definitionZh: v 缝被；缝制; n  被褥
definitionEn: If you quilt, or if you quilt a piece of fabric, you make a quilt; a warm thick cover for a bed, made by sewing two layers of cloth together, with feathers or a thick material in between them
example: Maggie knows how to quilt.

definitionZh: adj  第一的， 首要的； 最著名的; n 首相，总理
definitionEn: best or most important; a  prime minister  – used in news reports
example: one of Dublin’s premier hotels

definitionZh: adj  过敏的， 变态反应的； 对…讨厌的
definitionEn: having an allergy
example: an allergic reaction to nuts

definitionZh: n  海洋学者
example: In 1904 Johannes Schmidt, a young Danish oceanographer and biologist, got a job aboard the Thor, a Danish research vessel, studying the breeding habits of food fishes such as cod and herring.

definitionZh: n  秘闻； 轶事， 趣闻
definitionEn: a short story based on your personal experience
example: The book is full of amusing anecdotes about his life in Japan.

definitionZh: adj  爱发号施令的， 爱指手画脚的
definitionEn: too eager to tell people what to do – used to show disapproval
example: an officious traffic warden

definitionZh: v  渗入， 渗透； 悄悄进入， 潜入
definitionEn: to secretly join an organization or enter a place in order to find out information about it or harm it
example: Police attempts to infiltrate neo-Nazi groups were largely unsuccessful.

definitionZh: vi  辅修; adj 较小的；次要的; n 未成年人；辅修科目
definitionEn: small and not very important or serious, especially when compared with other things; someone who is below the age at which they become legally responsible for their actions
example: What are your major subject and minor subject?

definitionZh: adj  不友好的， 敌意的； 敌方的
definitionEn: angry and deliberately unfriendly towards someone, and ready to argue with them
example: Southampton fans gave their former coach a hostile reception .

definitionZh: n  植物群
definitionEn: all the plants that grow in a particular place or country
example: Tourism is damaging the flora and fauna (= plants and animals ) of the island.

definitionZh: adj  天空的， 天上的
definitionEn: relating to the sky or heaven
example: ...the clusters of celestial bodies in the ever-expanding universe.

definitionZh: vt  译， 解， 破译
definitionEn: to discover the meaning of a message written in a  code (= a set of secret signs or letters )
example: The software decodes the information embedded in the satellite broadcasts.

definitionZh: v 出现伤痕；挫伤; n  伤痕， 擦痕， 青肿
definitionEn: to affect someone badly and make them feel less confident; a purple or brown mark on your skin that you get because you have fallen, been hit etc
example: She fell off her bike and bruised her knee.

definitionZh: v 缓慢行进；爬行; n  缓慢的速度
definitionEn: to move along on your hands and knees with your body close to the ground; Crawl is also a noun
example: The floor was crawling with ants.

definitionZh: adj  相同的； 同一的
definitionEn: exactly the same, or very similar
example: four identical houses

definitionZh: adj  未受协助的， 独立的
definitionEn: without help
example: She can no longer walk unaided.

definitionZh: adj  有雄心的， 有野心的
definitionEn: determined to be successful, rich, powerful etc
example: Alfred was intensely ambitious, obsessed with the idea of becoming rich.

definitionZh: adj 学术的；学校的，学院的；纯理论的; n  大学教师
definitionEn: relating to education, especially at college or university level; a teacher in a college or university
example: He possessed no academic qualifications.

definitionZh: adj  珊瑚色的， 红色的; n 珊瑚
definitionEn: pink or reddish-orange in colour; a hard red, white, or pink substance formed from the bones of very small sea creatures, which is often used to make jewellery
example: It is like the bow of the King of the Persians that is painted with vermilion and is tipped with coral.

definitionZh: v  运行； 起作用; n 机能，功能，作用；函数
definitionEn: to work in the correct or intended way; the purpose that something has, or the job that someone or something does
example: Her legs have now ceased to function .

definitionZh: v 举起，提升；直立；增加；募集；饲养，养育；引起；提出; n  提升， 增加
definitionEn: to move or lift something to a higher position, place, or level; an increase in the money you earn
example: Can you raise the lamp so I can see?

definitionZh: n  行为不良； 过失， 失职
definitionEn: illegal or immoral behaviour or actions, especially by young people
example: the ever-rising statistics of delinquency and crime

definitionZh: vt 用管道输送；用线路系统传输; n  管子， 管道； 烟斗
definitionEn: to send a liquid or gas through a pipe to another place; a tube through which a liquid or gas flows
example: villages with no piped water

definitionZh: adj  柔软的； 温顺的； 易受影响的
definitionEn: soft and moving easily in the way that you want
example: Isabel was pliant in his arms.

definitionZh: vt  尊敬， 敬畏
definitionEn: to respect and admire someone or something very much
example: The Chinese revered corn as a gift from heaven.

definitionZh: adj  典型的， 有代表性的; n 代表，代理人
definitionEn: typical of a particular group or thing; someone who has been chosen to speak, vote, or make decisions for someone else
example: The pollsters asked a representative sample of New York residents for their opinions.

definitionZh: adj  偷偷摸摸的， 鬼鬼祟祟的
definitionEn: doing things in a secret and often dishonest or unfair way
example: a sneaky little trick

definitionZh: n  经度， 经线
definitionEn: the distance east or west of a particular  meridian (= imaginary line along the Earth’s surface from the North Pole to the South Pole )  , measured in degrees
example: The town lies at longitude 12˚ east.

definitionZh: n  鸽子
definitionEn: a grey bird with short legs that is common in cities
example: One blue pigeon sitting on a wall.

definitionZh: adj  懒散的； 不严格的， 马虎的
definitionEn: not strict or careful enough about standards of behaviour, work, safety etc
example: One of the problem areas is lax security for airport personnel.

definitionZh: n  比较， 对比； 比拟， 比喻
definitionEn: the process of comparing two or more people or things
example: Her paintings invite comparison with those of the early Impressionists (= they remind you of them ) .

definitionZh: v  产； 放置； 铺； 筹划， 设置； 提出， 提交
definitionEn: to put someone or something down carefully into a flat position
example: He laid his hand on my shoulder.

definitionZh: v 孵化，孵出; n  开口； 舱门
definitionEn: if an egg hatches, or if it is hatched, it breaks, letting the young bird, insect etc come out; a hole in a ship or aircraft, usually used for loading goods, or the door that covers it
example: The eggs take three days to hatch.

definitionZh: n  爱国者
definitionEn: someone who loves their country and is willing to defend it – used to show approval
example: It has been suggested the founders were not true patriots but men out to protect their own interests.

definitionZh: adj  有害的， 恶性的
definitionEn: very harmful or evil, often in a way that you do not notice easily
example: the pernicious effects of poverty

definitionZh: v  恢复； 归还， 归属
definitionEn: When people or things revert to a previous state, system, or type of behaviour, they go back to it
example: Jackson said her boss became increasingly depressed and reverted to smoking heavily.

definitionZh: n  同居， 同住
example: The obligation of cohabitation of spouses is the basis of marital rights.

definitionZh: n  食草动物
definitionEn: an animal that only eats plants
example: Most herbivore teeth are grinders, canines are usually absent.

definitionZh: adj  接替的， 继承的； 接连的， 连续的
definitionEn: coming or following one after the other
example: The team has had five successive victories.

definitionZh: n  奇遇； 冒险活动
definitionEn: an exciting experience in which dangerous or unusual things happen
example: a great adventure

definitionZh: n  典礼， 仪式； 礼节
definitionEn: an important social or religious event, when a traditional set of actions is performed in a formal way
example: a wedding ceremony

definitionZh: v  改善， 改进， 增进； 好转， 进步
definitionEn: to make something better, or to become better
example: a course for students wishing to improve their English

definitionZh: adj  田园诗般的， 田园风光的， 牧歌的
example: This idyllic pastoral scene is only part of the picture.

definitionZh: n 鹰，隼；主战分子; vt  叫卖， 兜售
definitionEn: a large bird that hunts and eats small birds and animals; to try to sell goods, usually by going from place to place and trying to persuade people to buy them
example: Oil thieves sometimes hawk stolen gasoline on the side of highways.

definitionZh: v 弄上斑点；点缀; n  斑点； 色斑
definitionEn: a small or slight mark usually of a contrasting colour, as on the skin, a bird's plumage, or eggs
example: AIM: To investigate the relation between left ventricular torsion(LVtor)/ rotation and cardiac cycle in normal persons by speckle tracking imaging(STI).

definitionZh: v  散发； 表现， 显示
definitionEn: to produce a smell, light etc, or to show a particular quality
example: He emanates tranquility.

definitionZh: adj 外部的，外表的; n  外部， 外表
definitionEn: on the outside of something; the outside of something, especially a building
example: The exterior walls need a new coat of paint.

definitionZh: n  囚禁， 拘留
definitionEn: when a person or animal is kept in a prison,  cage  etc and not allowed to go where they want
example: The hostages were released from captivity.

definitionZh: vt 征收; n  征收额； 税款； 征兵
definitionEn: to officially say that people must pay a tax or charge; an additional sum of money, usually paid as a tax
example: They levied religious taxes on Christian commercial transactions.

definitionZh: adj  有效的， 生效的； 显著的； 实际的， 事实上的
definitionEn: successful, and working in the way that was intended
example: The cheaper drugs are just as effective in treating arthritis.

definitionZh: n  肌肉； 体力， 力量， 实力； 影响力
definitionEn: one of the pieces of flesh inside your body that you use in order to move, and that connect your bones together
example: Relax your stomach muscles , then stretch again.

definitionZh: adj  慷慨的， 大方的； 大量的， 丰富的； 宽厚的， 宽宏大量的
definitionEn: someone who is generous is willing to give money, spend time etc, in order to help people or give them pleasure
example: a generous glass of wine

definitionZh: n  变迁， 不断的变动
definitionEn: a situation in which things are changing a lot and you cannot be sure what will happen
example: Everything is in flux at the moment.

definitionZh: n  果冻， 胶状物
definitionEn: a soft sweet food made from fruit juice and gelatin
example: raspberry jelly

definitionZh: v 探查，探测；盘问，追问; n  探针； 探测器； 探索， 调查
definitionEn: to ask questions in order to find things out, especially things that other people do not want you to know; a long thin metal instrument that doctors and scientists use to examine parts of the body
example: Police probed claims that he had sold drugs.

definitionZh: adj 新月形的；逐渐增强的; n  新月； 新月形， 月牙形
definitionEn: a curved shape that is wider in the middle and pointed at the ends
example: a small crescent of pastry topped with cheese

definitionZh: v  充气， 膨胀； 鼓吹， 吹捧； 涨价
definitionEn: to fill something with air or gas so it becomes larger, or to become filled with air or gas
example: It took us half an hour to inflate the dinghy.

definitionZh: adj 稳定的，安定的；牢固的；沉稳的; n  马厩
definitionEn: steady and not likely to move or change; a building where horses are kept
example: A wide base will make the structure much more stable.

definitionZh: adj  数量的， 定量的
definitionEn: relating to amounts rather than to the quality or standard of something
example: ...the advantages of quantitative and qualitative research.

definitionZh: n  吵闹， 喧哗
vt 利用…产生动力；给上挽具; n  马具
definitionEn: to put a harness on a horse; a set of leather bands used to control a horse or to attach it to a vehicle it is pulling
example: We can harness the power of the wind to generate electricity.

definitionZh: vt  煽动， 挑起， 激起
definitionEn: to cause trouble and make people start fighting each other or opposing the government
example: They were accused of fomenting rebellion.

definitionZh: vi  回答， 答复； 作出反应； 响应
definitionEn: to do something as a reaction to something that has been said or done
example: They are likely to respond positively to the president's request for aid.

definitionZh: n  事情， 事件； 摩擦， 冲突
definitionEn: an event, especially one that is unusual, important, or violent
example: Am I at risk because of some incident in my sexual past?

definitionZh: vi  成群， 成串； 丛生； 群集; n 簇，团，串，丛；群
definitionEn: If people cluster together, they gather together in a small group; a group of things of the same kind that are very close together
example: The passengers clustered together in small groups.

definitionZh: vi 捕食，捕获; n  猎物； 受害者， 牺牲品
definitionEn: A creature that preys on other creatures lives by catching and eating them; A creature's prey are the creatures that it hunts and eats in order to live
example: The effect was to disrupt the food chain, starving many animals and those that preyed on them.

definitionZh: n 穿着，服饰; vt  给…穿衣， 打扮
definitionEn: Your attire is the clothes you are wearing
example: ...seven women dressed in their finest attire.

definitionZh: v 拖，
definitionEn: to pull with one or more short, quick pulls
example: The woman gently tugged his arm.

definitionZh: n  神经元， 神经细胞
definitionEn: a type of cell that makes up the nervous system and sends messages to other parts of the body or the brain
example: Between any neurons, between the axon of one neuron and the dendrite of another, there's a tiny gap.

definitionZh: adj  有脊椎的; n 脊椎动物
definitionEn: a living creature that has a backbone
example: Dead bodies of vertebrate in the field should not be collected or closely examined.

definitionZh: n  远征； 探险
definitionEn: a long and carefully organized journey, especially to a dangerous or unfamiliar place, or the people that make this journey
example: an expedition to the North Pole

definitionZh: n  音乐会， 演奏会； 一致
definitionEn: a performance given by musicians or singers
example: a rock concert

definitionZh: vt  吸收； 理解， 掌握； 吸引…的注意， 使全神贯注； 使并入， 同化
definitionEn: to take in liquid, gas, or another substance from the surface or space around something
example: Plants absorb nutrients from the soil.

definitionZh: n 供应；储备；补给; vt  供给， 供应； 满足， 弥补
definitionEn: an amount of something that is available to be used; to provide people with something that they need or want, especially regularly over a long period of time
example: The nation’s fuel supplies will not last forever.

example: We went for the bottle of whisky that we had stashed behind the bookcase.

definitionZh: n  机动车停放； 停车场
definitionEn: the act of parking a car or other vehicle
example: No Parking (= used on signs )

definitionZh: n  工作室， 画室； 摄影室， 演播室， 录音室； 练习室； 电影公司
definitionEn: a room where television and radio programmes are made and broadcast or where music is recorded
example: a TV studio

definitionZh: vt  招致， 招惹， 遭受
definitionEn: if you incur something unpleasant, it happens to you because of something you have done
example: The government had also incurred huge debts.

definitionZh: adv 向下，往下; adj  向下的
definitionEn: If you want to emphasize that a statement applies to everyone in an organization, you can say that it applies from its leader downward; moving or pointing towards a lower position
example: ...from the president downward.

definitionZh: adj  微胖的； 丰满的
definitionEn: slightly fat in a fairly pleasant way – used especially about women or children, often to avoid saying the word ‘fat’
example: The nurse was a cheerful plump woman.

definitionZh: adv  并列地， 并排地
definitionEn: to walk, ride etc next to each other, all facing the same way
example: As the car drew abreast of him, Jack suddenly recognised the driver.

definitionZh: vi 弹回；后退，退缩；产生后坐力; n  后退， 退缩； 反冲， 后坐力
definitionEn: to move back suddenly and quickly from something you do not like or are afraid of
example: We recoil in horror from the thought of subjecting someone to extreme pain.

definitionZh: v  管理， 控制； 调整， 调节； 校准
definitionEn: to control an activity or process, especially by rules
example: strict rules regulating the use of chemicals in food

definitionZh: adj  交互式的； 合作的， 互相配合的
definitionEn: an interactive computer program, television system etc allows you to communicate directly with it, and does things in reaction to your actions
example: interactive computer systems

definitionZh: adj  倦怠的， 没精打采的
definitionEn: feeling tired and not interested in things
example: The heat was making me listless.

definitionZh: n  腺
definitionEn: an organ of the body which produces a substance that the body needs, such as hormones, sweat, or saliva
example: the pituitary gland

definitionZh: adj  补充的； 互补的
definitionEn: complementary things go well together, although they are usually different
example: The computer and the human mind have different but complementary abilities.

definitionZh: n  浓度， 密度； 一致性， 协调； 连接， 结合
definitionEn: the quality of always being the same, doing things in the same way, having the same standards etc – used to show approval
example: She scores goals with remarkable consistency.

definitionZh: n  折磨； 严峻考验
example: He was beginning to wonder if he would survive the ordeal.

definitionZh: n  灵长类， 灵长目动物； 大主教
definitionEn: a member of the group of animals that includes humans and monkeys
example: The woolly spider monkey is the largest primate in the Americas.

definitionZh: adj  成束的； 纤细的
example: The white floodlight shines through the wispy tule and makes thin shadows.

definitionZh: n  房屋和地基， 经营场址； 前提， 假设
definitionEn: the buildings and land that a shop, restaurant, company etc uses
example: Schools may earn extra money by renting out their premises.

definitionZh: vt  聚居于， 大批生长于； 开拓殖民地， 移居于
definitionEn: to establish political control over an area or over another country, and send your citizens there to settle
example: a dead tree that has been colonized by ants

definitionZh: n  季节； 时节； 时期
definitionEn: one of the main periods into which a year is divided, each of which has a particular type of weather. The seasons are spring, summer, autumn, and winter
example: the effect on plants as the seasons start to change

definitionZh: adj  引起争论的， 有争议的
definitionEn: causing a lot of disagreement, because many people have strong opinions about the subject being discussed
example: the controversial issue of welfare reform

definitionZh: vt  达到； 获得
definitionEn: to succeed in achieving something after trying for a long time
example: More women are attaining positions of power.

definitionZh: n 房客，承租人; vt  居住
definitionEn: someone who lives in a house, room etc and pays rent to the person who owns it
example: The desk was left by the previous tenant.

definitionZh: n  画廊， 美术馆
definitionEn: a large building where people can see famous pieces of art
example: an exhibition of African art at the Hayward Gallery

definitionZh: n  恢复； 整修， 修复； 复位， 复原； 归还
definitionEn: when you repair something such as an old building or a piece of furniture, so that it looks the same as when it was first built or made
example: Major restoration work will begin in May.

definitionZh: vi  变得苍白， 变得暗淡; adj 苍白的；淡色的；暗淡的，微弱的
definitionEn: if your face pales, it becomes whiter than usual because you have had a shock; having a skin colour that is very white, or whiter than it usually is
example: Kent’s face paled when he saw that Rob had a knife.

definitionZh: n  五金制品， 金属制品； 硬件
definitionEn: computer machinery and equipment, as opposed to the programs that make computers work
example: ...a shop from which an uncle had sold hardware and timber.

definitionZh: v 连续猛击; n  击球手； 面糊
definitionEn: to hit someone or something many times, in a way that hurts or damages them; a mixture of flour, eggs, milk etc, used in cooking and for making bread, cakes etc
example: He was battered to death .

definitionZh: n  不幸的人； 恶棍， 无赖
definitionEn: someone that you feel sorry for
example: He was a lonely, miserable wretch.

definitionZh: n  优先权， 优先； 优先考虑的事， 最重要的事
definitionEn: the right to be given attention first and before other people or things
example: I want to start work on the garden but the house must take priority .

definitionZh: adj  金属般的； 金属制的； 含金属的
definitionEn: a metallic noise sounds like pieces of metal hitting each other
example: The key turned in the lock with a loud metallic click.

definitionZh: adj  有创造力的， 创造性的
definitionEn: involving the use of imagination to produce new ideas or things
example: This job is so boring. I wish I could do something more creative.

definitionZh: n  神话； 神话学； 虚幻的想法
definitionEn: set of ancient myths
example: characters from classical mythology

definitionZh: v 穿梭往返；短程往返运送; n  航天飞机； 梭子； 航班
definitionEn: to travel frequently between two places; a  space shuttle
example: The passengers were shuttled to the hotel by bus.

definitionZh: vt  分配， 分派， 把…拨给
definitionEn: to use something for a particular purpose, give something to a particular person etc, especially after an official decision has been made
example: Tickets are limited and will be allocated to those who apply first.

definitionZh: n  硬面包圈
definitionEn: a small ring-shaped type of bread
example: Imagine the economy is a bagel bakery struggling through a slow week.

definitionZh: adj  最初的； 首要的； 基本的
definitionEn: most important
example: Our primary concern is to provide the refugees with food and health care.

definitionZh: n 原木，木材；日志，航海日志，飞行日志; vt  记录； 伐木
definitionEn: a thick piece of wood from a tree; to make an official record of events, facts etc
example: a roaring log fire

definitionZh: n  企业， 公司； 事业
definitionEn: a company, organization, or business
example: commercial enterprises such as banks and food manufacturers

definitionZh: n  猎鹰， 隼
definitionEn: a bird that kills and eats other animals and can be trained to hunt

definitionZh: n  通风设备； 空气流通
example: I see no ventilation to speak of, none from a window or a ventilator at least.

definitionZh: adj  太阳的， 日光的； 太阳能的
definitionEn: relating to the sun
example: a solar eclipse

definitionZh: vt  消耗， 损耗； 消费； 吃， 喝； 使充满； 烧毁， 毁灭
definitionEn: to use time, energy, goods etc
example: Only 27% of the paper we consume is recycled.

definitionZh: n  形成， 构成； 形成物； 编队
definitionEn: the process of starting a new organization or group
example: We now know a lot more about the early stages of planetary formation.

definitionZh: n  心理分析， 精神分析
definitionEn: medical treatment that involves talking to someone about their life, feelings etc in order to find out the hidden causes of their problems
example: In theory, psychoanalysis is the philosophy of the unconscious mind; in practice it is a means by which mental disorders can be cured.

definitionZh: n  双语现象
definitionEn: Bilingualism is the ability to speak two languages equally well
example: I recently had the pleasure of conducting an interview with him on bilingualism, translation, and interpreting.

definitionZh: n  能力， 胜任； 权限； 技能
definitionEn: the ability to do something well
example: Typing is considered by most employers to be a basic competence.

definitionZh: v 融合；熔接；熔化；因保险丝烧断而断电；合并; n  保险丝； 引信； 导火线
definitionEn: to combine different qualities, ideas, or things, or to be combined; a short thin piece of wire inside electrical equipment which prevents damage by melting and stopping the electricity when there is too much power
example: Their music fuses elements as diverse as Cajun, bebop and Cuban waltzes.

definitionZh: adj  琐碎的， 无关紧要的； 愚蠢的， 可笑的； 无聊的， 不严肃的， 轻佻的
definitionEn: not serious or sensible, especially in a way that is not suitable for a particular occasion
example: The court discourages frivolous law suits.

definitionZh: n  借口， 托词
definitionEn: a false reason given for an action, in order to hide the real reason
example: He’ll phone on some pretext or other.

definitionZh: adj  突现的； 新兴的； 紧急的
definitionEn: An emergent country, political movement, or social group is one that is becoming powerful or coming into existence
example: ...an emergent state.

definitionZh: vt  确保； 使确信
definitionEn: to tell someone that something will definitely happen or is definitely true so that they are less worried
example: The document is genuine, I can assure you .

definitionZh: v  请教； 商议； 参考， 翻阅
definitionEn: to ask for information or advice from someone because it is their job to know something
example: If symptoms persist, consult a doctor without delay.

definitionZh: n  基金， 资金； 提供资金
definitionEn: Funding is money which a government or organization provides for a particular purpose
example: They hope for government funding for the programme.

definitionZh: v  幸免， 幸存； 继续存在， 存货； 艰难度过； 比…长命
definitionEn: If a person or living thing survives in a dangerous situation such as an accident or an illness, they do not die
example: ...the sequence of events that left the eight pupils battling to survive in icy seas for over four hours.

definitionZh: adj 开始的，最初的; n  词首大写字母
definitionEn: happening at the beginning; the first letter of someone’s first name
example: an initial investment of £5,000

definitionZh: adj  未充分发展的， 原始的； 基本的， 基础的
definitionEn: a rudimentary knowledge or understanding of a subject is very simple and basic
example: Gradually, I acquired a rudimentary knowledge of music.

definitionZh: n  对手， 敌手
definitionEn: a country or person you are fighting or competing against
example: his old adversary

definitionZh: vt  假定， 假设
definitionEn: to suggest that something might have happened or be true
example: He dismissed arguments postulating differing standards for human rights in different cultures and regions.

definitionZh: vt  大批滋生， 大批出没于
definitionEn: if insects, rats etc infest a place, there are a lot of them and they usually cause damage
example: ...pests like aphids which infest cereal crops.

definitionZh: adj  讽刺的， 嘲讽的
example: Among her early works is a satiric portrayal of the upper-middle class imagery of a woman working within the peach trees, or in a flower garden.

definitionZh: adj  永恒的， 不朽的
definitionEn: continuing for ever and having no end
example: the Christian promise of eternal life

definitionZh: v  变皱， 起皱； 破裂； 崩溃， 垮台
definitionEn: If you crumple something such as paper or cloth, or if it crumples, it is squashed and becomes full of untidy creases and folds
example: She crumpled the paper in her hand.

definitionZh: n  讽刺文学， 讽刺作品； 讽刺
definitionEn: a way of criticizing something such as a group of people or a system, in which you deliberately make them seem funny so that people will see their faults
example: the characteristic use of satire in Jonson’s work

definitionZh: adj  流行的， 普遍的
definitionEn: common at a particular time, in a particular place, or among a particular group of people
example: the prevalent belief in astrology

definitionZh: vi  附着， 黏住； 紧紧抓住； 挨近
definitionEn: to hold someone or something tightly, especially because you do not feel safe
example: Some children tend to cling on their first day at school.

definitionZh: v 夹住，扣住；修剪；剪下; n  夹子， 回形针， 别针； 弹夹， 弹仓； 电影片段， 剪报
definitionEn: to fasten something together or to be fastened together using a clip; a small metal or plastic object that holds or fastens things together
example: a stack of bills clipped together

definitionZh: n  绿洲； 避风港
definitionEn: a place with water and trees in a desert
example: The immaculately tended gardens are an oasis in the midst of Cairo's urban sprawl.

definitionZh: adj  滋养的， 有营养的; n 滋养物，营养品
definitionEn: a chemical or food that provides what is needed for plants or animals to live and grow
example: To examine the global impact of acidification, the researchers developed a series of world maps to show current coal use, nutrient consumption, and copper production and smelting by country.

definitionZh: adj 紧凑的；简洁的; vt  压缩
definitionEn: packed or put together firmly and closely; to press something together so that it becomes smaller or more solid
example: The bushes grew in a compact mass.

definitionZh: vt 宣布…为非法; n  罪犯， 歹徒， 亡命之徒； 被剥夺法律权益者
definitionEn: to completely stop something by making it illegal; someone who has done something illegal, and who is hiding in order to avoid punishment – used especially about criminals in the past
example: The bill would have outlawed several types of guns.

definitionZh: vt  灌溉； 冲洗
definitionEn: to supply land or crops with water
example: The water in Lake Powell is used to irrigate the area.

definitionZh: v  枯萎
definitionEn: if something shrivels, or if it is shrivelled, it becomes smaller and its surface becomes covered in lines because it is very dry or old
example: The leaves change colour, then shrivel.

definitionZh: v  在表面形成硬壳， 结壳； 用…装饰外层
definitionEn: to cover or overlay with or as with a crust or hard coating

definitionZh: n  高涨； 激增
definitionEn: a sudden strong feeling
example: ...the upsurge in oil prices.

definitionZh: n 坝，堤; vt  筑坝； 控制
definitionEn: a special wall built across a river or stream to stop the water from flowing, especially in order to make a lake or produce electricity; to stop the water in a river or stream from flowing by building a special wall across it
example: Before the dam was built, Campbell River used to flood in the spring.

definitionZh: v  开花; n 花；开花；青春焕发
definitionEn: if a plant or a flower blooms, its flowers appear or open; a flower or flowers
example: These plants bloom in spring.

definitionZh: v  表示， 意指； 标示， 预示， 象征
definitionEn: to mean something
example: What does the word ‘curriculum’ denote that ‘course’ does not?

definitionZh: vt 将…划做特殊区域；分区，划分地带; n  地区， 地域， 地带； 气候带
definitionEn: if an area of land is zoned, it is officially kept separate from other land so that it can be used for a particular purpose; a large area that is different from other areas around it in some way
example: The land is currently zoned for residential use.

definitionZh: adj  听得见的
definitionEn: a sound that is audible is loud enough for you to hear it
example: His voice was barely audible (=  could only just be heard  ) above the roar of the crowd.

definitionZh: vt  劝告， 规劝， 告诫
definitionEn: If you exhort someone to do something, you try hard to persuade or encourage them to do it
example: Kennedy exhorted his listeners to turn away from violence.

definitionZh: v  繁殖； 散布， 传播
definitionEn: to spread an idea, belief etc to many people
example: The group launched a website to propagate its ideas .

definitionZh: adj  格子花纹的； 棋盘状的
definitionEn: Something that is checked has a pattern of small squares, usually of two colours
example: He was wearing blue jeans and a checked shirt.

definitionZh: vt  需要， 使成为必要
definitionEn: to make it necessary for you to do something
example: Lack of money necessitated a change of plan.

definitionZh: adj  传统的； 正统的
definitionEn: orthodox ideas, methods, or behaviour are accepted by most people to be correct and right
example: orthodox medical treatments

definitionZh: n  劫掠， 掠夺， 破坏
definitionEn: an act of taking or destroying something
example: Much of the region's environmental depredation is a result of poor planning.

definitionZh: n  结合， 混合； 化合； 组合
definitionEn: two or more different things that exist together or are used or put together
example: a combination nightclub and café

definitionZh: n&vt  埋伏， 伏击
definitionEn: a sudden attack on someone by people who have been hiding and waiting for them, or the place where this happens
example: The soldiers were killed in an ambush.

definitionZh: n  〈总称〉首饰； 珠宝
v  获得； 通用， 流行
definitionEn: to get something that you want, especially through your own effort, skill, or work
example: These conditions no longer obtain.

definitionZh: n  政治家
definitionEn: a political or government leader, especially one who is respected as being wise and fair
example: a respected elder statesman

definitionZh: v 成四倍; adj 四部分组成的；四倍的; n  四倍
definitionEn: to increase and become four times as big or as high, or to make something increase in this way; four times as big or as many
example: Food prices quadrupled during the war.

definitionZh: adj 熟练的，精通的，内行的; n  行家， 熟手
definitionEn: good at something that needs care and skill
example: I’m afraid she’s also an adept liar.

definitionZh: n  好奇心， 求知欲； 罕见而有趣之物， 珍品
definitionEn: the desire to know about something
example: I opened the packet just to satisfy my curiosity .

definitionZh: v 称为，认为; n  名声， 名誉
definitionEn: reputation
example: Under his leadership, the U.N.'s repute has risen immeasurably.

definitionZh: adj  敏捷的， 灵活的
definitionEn: able to move quickly and easily with light neat movements
example: nimble fingers

definitionZh: adj  可爱的； 友好的， 和蔼的， 亲切的
definitionEn: friendly and easy to like
example: The driver was an amiable young man.

definitionZh: n 设计，安排；格式，样式; vt  使格式化
definitionEn: the way in which something such as a television show or meeting is organized or arranged; to organize the space on a computer  disk  so that information can be stored on it
example: The courses were run to a consistent format.

definitionZh: v 牺牲，献出；以…做祭献; n  牺牲， 献身； 献祭， 祭品
definitionEn: to willingly stop having something you want or doing something you like in order to get something more important; when you decide not to have something valuable, in order to get something that is more important
example: The priest sacrificed a chicken.

definitionZh: adj 特定的；独特的；详细的；挑剔的; n  详情， 细目
definitionEn: a particular thing or person is the one that you are talking about, and not any other; the facts and details about a job, property, legal case etc
example: In this particular case, no one else was involved.

definitionZh: n  军团， 兵团； 特种部队； 一群人， 一组人
definitionEn: a group in an army with special duties and responsibilities
example: the medical corps

definitionZh: n&v  中止， 暂停
definitionEn: to stop speaking or doing something for a short time before starting again
example: There was a pause while Alice changed the tape.

definitionZh: adj  正规的， 正式的； 形式的
definitionEn: made or done officially or publicly
example: formal recognition of the reformed church

definitionZh: n  彩虹
definitionEn: a large curve of different colours that can appear in the sky when there is both sun and rain
example: ...silk and satin in every shade of the rainbow.

definitionZh: n  导师， 讲师； 教练， 指导员
definitionEn: someone who teaches a sport or practical skill
example: a driving instructor

definitionZh: n  热情， 热烈
example: He took up the cause with evangelical fervor .

definitionZh: adj  富足的， 充足的， 丰富的； 宽敞的
definitionEn: more than enough
example: an ample bosom

definitionZh: n  内聚力； 凝聚力； 团结， 结合
definitionEn: if there is cohesion among a group of people, a set of ideas etc, all the parts or members of it are connected or related in a reasonable way to form a whole
example: a sense of community and social cohesion

definitionZh: v  招待， 款待； 使快乐， 娱乐
definitionEn: to invite people to your home for a meal, party etc, or to take your company’s customers somewhere to have a meal, drinks etc
example: Mark usually does the cooking when we entertain.

definitionZh: v  缓和， 减轻; n 不费力，容易；悠闲，自在
definitionEn: if something unpleasant eases, or if you ease it, it gradually improves or becomes less; if you do something with ease, it is very easy for you to do it
example: measures to ease congestion in the city

definitionZh: n  调味品
definitionEn: a powder or liquid, such as salt or  ketchup  , that you use to give a special taste to food
example: Friendship is not only the condiment but also the anodyne of life.

definitionZh: n  确定， 确信； 必然性
definitionEn: the state of being or feeling certain about something

definitionZh: v 超过，溢出；泛滥；横行; n  泛滥； 超出的部分
definitionEn: if unwanted things or people overrun a place, they spread over it in great numbers; Overrun is also a noun
example: The final speaker overran by at least half an hour.

definitionZh: adj  欺骗性的， 导致误解的
definitionEn: intended to make someone believe something that is not true
example: misleading and deceptive adverts

definitionZh: n  数学
definitionEn: the science of numbers and of shapes, including  algebra  ,  geometry  , and  arithmetic
example: ...a professor of mathematics at Boston College.

definitionZh: n  反应堆
definitionEn: a  nuclear reactor
example: Where do you all live? Do you live near a reactor?

definitionZh: n  野外烧烤宴会
definitionEn: a party or occasion when a meal is cooked and eaten outdoors
example: a cookout on the beach

definitionZh: vt  想象， 展望， 预想
definitionEn: to imagine something that you think might happen in the future, especially something that you think will be good
example: I envisioned a future of educational excellence.

definitionZh: n  大声疾呼， 强烈的抗议
definitionEn: an angry protest by a lot of ordinary people
example: The closure of the local hospital has caused a huge public outcry.

definitionZh: v  刺穿； 渗透； 洞察
definitionEn: to enter something and pass or spread through it, especially when this is difficult
example: bullets that penetrate thick armour plating

definitionZh: v  用桨划船； 涉水， 戏水; n 桨；桡足
definitionEn: to move a small light boat through water, using one or more paddles; a short pole that is wide and flat at the end, used for moving a small boat in water
example: children paddling in the sea

definitionZh: vt  重新计划， 重订…的时间表
definitionEn: to arrange for something to happen at a different time from the one that was previously planned
example: Since I'll be away, I'd like to reschedule the meeting.

definitionZh: adj 主要的，最重要的; n  校长； 资本； 主角
definitionEn: most important; someone who is in charge of a school
example: His principal reason for making the journey was to visit his family.

definitionZh: v  趋于， 易于； 照料， 看护
definitionEn: to look after someone or something
example: Sofia was in the bedroom tending to her son.

definitionZh: adj  昏暗的； 忧郁的
example: In the somber archives of a sedate museum a large archaic volume is somewhat conspicuously displayed.

definitionZh: n  同义词
definitionEn: a word with the same meaning as another word in the same language
example: The term "industrial democracy" is often used as a synonym for worker participation.

definitionZh: adj  公平的， 公正的
definitionEn: treating all people in a fair and equal way
example: an equitable distribution of food supplies

definitionZh: adj  不引人瞩目的， 不显眼的
definitionEn: not easily seen or noticed
example: an inconspicuous little restaurant

definitionZh: n  标本， 样本； 范例； 抽样
definitionEn: a small amount or piece that is taken from something, so that it can be tested or examined
example: a blood specimen

definitionZh: adj  外来的， 来自异国的； 奇异的

definitionZh: n  缓解， 减轻， 轻松； 援救， 救济； 宽慰； 浮雕

definitionZh: vt  联合抵制， 拒绝购买

definitionZh: n  介绍； 传入， 引进； 导言， 绪论

definitionZh: v  订购， 订阅； 申请， 预订； 捐助， 赞助

definitionZh: n  治疗， 疗法

definitionZh: n  染色体

definitionZh: n  专注， 专心； 浓度， 含量； 集中， 聚集

definitionZh: n  速度， 速率； 迅速

definitionZh: n  友谊； 奖学金； 团体， 协会

definitionZh: n  同事， 同僚

definitionZh: adj  未装饰的， 朴实的

definitionZh: n  供认， 招供， 坦白； 供词； 承认

definitionZh: n  子午线， 经线

definitionZh: vi  干涉， 干扰， 妨碍

definitionZh: n  公寓套房； 房间

definitionZh: vt  忍受； 容许， 承认

definitionZh: v  堆积， 堆放; n 堆

definitionZh: v  憎恶， 愤恨， 怨恨

definitionZh: adj  似火的； 易怒的， 暴躁的

definitionZh: v 模拟，模仿; n  喜剧； 哑剧； 哑剧演员； 模拟表演

definitionZh: adj  不明确的， 模棱两可的

definitionZh: n  国会， 议会

definitionZh: vt  减轻， 减少

definitionZh: n  道路； 路线； 小路， 小径
definitionEn: a track that has been made deliberately or made by many people walking over the same ground

definitionZh: v 破裂，断裂；发出爆裂声；重击，猛击；崩溃，
definitionEn: to break or to make something break, either so that it gets lines on its surface, or so that it breaks into pieces

definitionZh: vi  溺爱

definitionZh: n  数据检索； 取回， 索回

definitionZh: adj  可能的； 可信的， 可想象的

definitionZh: n  立方体； 立方形的东西； 立方

definitionZh: v  同步， 同时发生

definitionZh: n  美洲杉， 红杉

definitionZh: v  影响； 冲击， 撞击; n  影响； 冲击， 撞击

definitionZh: adj  轻微的； 温和的； 随和的

definitionZh: n 人物专访；概述，传略，人物简介；面部的侧影；轮廓，外形; vt  扼要介绍， 概述

definitionZh: n 账单；纸币，钞票；议案，法案；节目单；招贴，海报; vt  用招贴宣布； 给…开账单

definitionZh: n 支流；

definitionZh: v 堵塞，阻塞; n  障碍

definitionZh: adj 地位较高的；

definitionZh: v  膨胀， 扩大； 详述

definitionZh: n  领土； 领域

definitionZh: n  人口普查， 人口统计

definitionZh: v 胡乱涂抹；弄脏；诽谤，诋毁; n  污迹， 污斑； 诽谤， 诋毁； 涂片

definitionZh: adj  成心的， 有意的； 任性的

definitionZh: adj 相对的；有关的; n  亲属， 亲戚

definitionZh: v  比较， 相比， 对比

definitionZh: n  多元化， 多元性； 多元主义

definitionZh: adj  有影响力的； 有权势的

definitionZh: vt  遗赠； 流传

definitionZh: adj  透明的； 明显的， 显而易见的； 直率的

definitionZh: adj  适合的， 有适应性的

definitionZh: v 铸造; n  薄荷； 造币厂； 大量的钱

definitionZh: vt&n  抓住； 掌握， 理解， 领会

definitionZh: adj  混乱的， 无秩序的

definitionZh: n  习得， 获得； 收购， 购置

definitionZh: adj  芬芳的， 香的

definitionZh: adj 模糊的；暗淡的；朦胧的；不乐观的; v  变暗淡； 变冷漠

definitionZh: n  光解

definitionZh: adj  不整洁的， 邋遢的

definitionZh: adj  不可渗透的， 不透水的

definitionZh: adj  预防的

definitionZh: v 挤压；挤入；挤过，塞入；压榨，榨取；
