definitionZh: adj  无止境的， 无穷尽的
definitionEn: very large in amount, size, or number
example: an endless stream of visitors

definitionZh: v 猛击；捣碎；怦怦跳; n  磅； 英镑
definitionEn: If you pound something, you crush it into a paste or a powder or into very small pieces; a unit for measuring weight, equal to 16  ounce s  or 0.454 kilograms
example: She pounded the corn kernels.

definitionZh: n 负荷，负担；装载; vt  装载， 使负担
definitionEn: a large quantity of something that is carried by a vehicle, person etc; to put a program into a computer
example: The lorry hadshed its load(= the load had fallen off ).

definitionZh: n  种植园； 人造林
definitionEn: a large area of land in a hot country, where crops such as tea, cotton, and sugar are grown
example: a rubber plantation

definitionZh: vt  忽视； 不顾， 不理
definitionEn: to deliberately pay no attention to something that you have been told or that you know about
example: You can’t ignore the fact that many criminals never go to prison.

definitionZh: n  半球； 大脑半球
definitionEn: a half of the Earth, especially one of the halves above and below the  equator
example: the Northern hemisphere

definitionZh: n  延长， 延续， 持续； 延长物， 扩建物； 延续部分
definitionEn: something that continues or follows something else that has happened before, without a stop or change
example: It's the coalition forces who are to blame for the continuation of the war.

definitionZh: v  鼓掌， 喝彩； 称赞
definitionEn: to hit your open hands together, to show that you have enjoyed a play, concert, speaker etc
example: The audience applauded loudly.

definitionZh: adj  月亮的
definitionEn: relating to the Moon or to travel to the Moon
example: studies of the lunar surface

definitionZh: n  诗歌； 诗集； 诗意
definitionEn: poems in general, or the art of writing them
example: He reads a lot of poetry.

definitionZh: adj  傲慢的， 自大的
definitionEn: behaving in an unpleasant or rude way because you think you are more important than other people
example: He was unbearably arrogant.

definitionZh: vt  转播； 传达， 转述; n  接替人员， 轮换者； 接力赛； 中继设备
definitionEn: to pass a message from one person or place to another; if people do something in relays, several small groups of them do it, one group after another, so that the activity is continuous
example: The broadcasts were relayed by satellite.

definitionZh: n  允许， 同意； 许可证， 书面许可
definitionEn: If someone who has authority over you gives you permission to do something, they say that they will allow you to do it
example: He asked permission to leave the room.

definitionZh: v  弥漫； 渗透
definitionEn: if liquid, gas etc permeates something, it enters it and spreads through every part of it
example: The smell of diesel oil permeated the air.

definitionZh: adj  一夫一妻制的； 单配的
definitionEn: Someone who is monogamous or who has a monogamous relationship has a sexual relationship with only one partner
example: Do you believe that men are not naturally monogamous?

definitionZh: vt 安排，预定; n  时刻表， 日程表； 清单， 明细表
definitionEn: to plan that something will happen at a particular time; a plan of what someone is going to do and when they are going to do it
example: We will not cancel your holiday less than eight weeks before the scheduled departure date .

definitionZh: vt  逮捕； 领会， 理解
definitionEn: if the police apprehend a criminal, they catch him or her
example: The police have failed to apprehend the culprits.

definitionZh: adj  令人震惊的； 严重损害身体的； 极其有害的
definitionEn: causing so much damage or harm that something no longer works or is no longer effective
example: the crippling effects of war on the economy

definitionZh: v  继承， 遗传而得
definitionEn: to receive money, property etc from someone after they have died
example: inherited wealth

definitionZh: adj  费力的， 艰巨的
definitionEn: involving a lot of strength and effort
example: ...a long, hot and arduous trip.

definitionZh: v  解释， 说明； 理解； 翻译
definitionEn: to translate spoken words from one language into another
example: They spoke good Spanish, and promised to interpret for me.

definitionZh: n  派别， 派系， 小集团； 派系斗争
definitionEn: a small group of people within a larger group, who have different ideas from the other members, and who try to get their own ideas accepted
example: struggles between the different factions within the party

definitionZh: n  海滩， 湖滩， 河滩
definitionEn: an area of sand or small stones at the edge of the sea or a lake
example: a sandy beach

definitionZh: n  宇宙； 世界
definitionEn: all space, including all the stars and planets
example: Einstein's equations showed the universe to be expanding.

definitionZh: n  毯子； 覆盖物
definitionEn: a cover for a bed, usually made of wool
example: The mud disappeared under a blanket of snow.

definitionZh: v 给予，授予；允许，同意；承认; n  拨款； 津贴； 授予物
definitionEn: to give someone something or allow them to have something that they have asked for
example: Britain could grant Spain’s request .

definitionZh: vt  收回， 弥补
definitionEn: to get back an amount of money you have lost or spent
example: The movie will have to be a huge hit to recoup its cost.

definitionZh: n  含水土层
definitionEn: In geology, an aquifer is an area of rock underneath the surface of the earth which absorbs and holds water
example: A long-term maintenance regime relies solely on natural methods to protect the watershed and aquifer.

definitionZh: vt  附加， 增补
definitionEn: to add something to a piece of writing
example: She appended a note at the end of the letter.

definitionZh: n  时事通讯
definitionEn: a short written report of news about a club, organization etc that is sent regularly to people who are interested
example: The society publishes a newsletter twice a year.

definitionZh: n  副驾驶员
example: That's me, the copilot, and one of the air stewardesses.

definitionZh: adj  寒冷的； 冷淡的
definitionEn: a woman who is frigid does not like having sex
example: The guard looked at us with a frigid stare.

definitionZh: n  遗物， 遗迹， 遗风
definitionEn: an old object or custom that reminds people of the past or that has lived on from a past time
example: Roman relics found in a field

definitionZh: n  风箱
definitionEn: A bellows is or bellows are a device used for blowing air into a fire in order to make it burn more fiercely
example: Music bellows from his insides.

definitionZh: n  折扣; vt  把…打折扣； 不全信， 漠视， 低估
definitionEn: a reduction in the usual price of something; to reduce the price of something
example: They are often available at a discount.

definitionZh: v  改变； 转变， 转化
definitionEn: to change something into a different form, or to change something so that it can be used for a different purpose or in a different way
example: a 19th-century converted barn

definitionZh: vt  建造； 创立; n  构想， 观念
definitionEn: to build something such as a house, bridge, road etc; an idea formed by combining several pieces of information or knowledge
example: There are plans to construct a new road bridge across the river.

definitionZh: n&vi  尝试； 努力
definitionEn: an act of trying to do something, especially something difficult
example: Weather conditions prevented them from attempting the jump.

definitionZh: n  竞争 ； 敌对
definitionEn: a situation in which two or more people, teams, or companies are competing for something, especially over a long period of time, and the feeling of competition between them
example: The two players have developed a friendly rivalry .

definitionZh: n  超凡魅力； 感召力； 号召力
definitionEn: a natural ability to attract and interest other people and make them admire you
example: He lacks charisma.

definitionZh: n  除， 除法； 分开， 分隔； 分配； 部分； 分歧， 分裂； 部门
definitionEn: the act of separating something into two or more different parts, or the way these parts are separated or shared
example: the traditional division of labour (= the way that particular tasks are shared ) between husband and wife

definitionZh: vt 使平衡，使均衡; n  天平， 秤； 平衡； 差额； 余款
definitionEn: if a government balances the budget, they make the amount of money that they spend equal to the amount of money available; a state in which all your weight is evenly spread so that you do not fall
example: Job losses in manufacturing were balanced by job increases in the service sector.

definitionZh: v  偷偷接近； 跟踪； 趾高气扬地走; n 茎，梗，柄
definitionEn: to follow a person or animal quietly in order to catch and attack or kill them; a long narrow part of a plant that supports leaves, fruits, or flowers
example: a tiger stalking its prey

definitionZh: n  胰腺
definitionEn: a  gland  inside your body, near your stomach, that produces  insulin  and a liquid that helps your body to use the food that you eat
example: Tuberous sclerosis can lead to the formation of fibroids or tumors in the pancreas, bone, and liver.

definitionZh: n  供应者， 供应商， 供货方
definitionEn: a company or person that provides a particular product
example: ...one of the country's biggest food suppliers.

definitionZh: adj  家长的， 族长的； 德高望重的
adj  模仿的， 模拟的; vt 模仿；像; n 模仿者；小丑
definitionEn: to copy the way someone speaks or behaves, especially in order to make people laugh
example: Second, funds that mimic indexes will almost always have lower fees because of the passive investment strategy of managers of index funds.

definitionZh: n 音高，音调；倾斜度；沥青，柏油；
definitionEn: a black, sticky substance that is used on roofs, the bottoms of ships etc to stop water coming through
example: The night was as black as pitch (= very dark ) .

definitionZh: n  功绩， 壮举
definitionEn: something that is an impressive achievement, because it needs a lot of skill, strength etc to do
example: A racing car is an extraordinary feat of engineering.

definitionZh: adj  不断的， 不停的
definitionEn: continuing without stopping
example: The child’s incessant talking started to irritate her.

definitionZh: n  洪流， 急流； 爆发， 迸发
definitionEn: a large amount of water moving very quickly and strongly in a particular direction
example: After five days of heavy rain the Telle river was a raging torrent (= a very violent torrent ) .

definitionZh: n  欣赏； 理解， 体谅； 感激； 鉴定， 评价
definitionEn: pleasure you feel when you realize something is good, useful, or well done
example: He was presented with a watch in appreciation of his long service.

definitionZh: n  雕像
definitionEn: an image of a person or animal that is made in solid material such as stone or metal and is usually large
example: Churchill’s statue stands outside the parliament building.

definitionZh: v  觉得， 意识到; n 感官，官能；感觉；判断力；意义，意思
definitionEn: if you sense something, you feel that it exists or is true, without being told or having proof; a feeling about something
example: Perhaps he sensed your distrust.

definitionZh: v 酿造；冲泡；酝酿，行将发生; n  冲泡的饮料； 啤酒
definitionEn: to make beer; a drink that is brewed, especially tea
example: Every beer on the menu was brewed locally.

definitionZh: n  要求， 主张； 自命不凡； 虚饰
definitionEn: an attempt to seem more important, more intelligent, or of a higher class than you really are
example: the humbleness and lack of pretension of Jordan’s cafe

definitionZh: v  偏斜， 转向
definitionEn: if someone or something deflects something that is moving, or if it deflects, it turns in a different direction
example: He deflected the blow with his forearm.

definitionZh: adj  有道德的， 品行端正的， 品德高的； 〈贬〉自命清高的， 自以为是的
definitionEn: behaving in a very honest and moral way
example: a virtuous man

definitionZh: adj  无效的； 无可靠根据的， 站不住脚的; n  病弱者， 残疾者
definitionEn: a contract, ticket, claim etc that is invalid is not legally or officially acceptable; someone who cannot look after themselves because of illness, old age, or injury
example: Without the right date stamped on it, your ticket will be invalid.

definitionZh: adj  合法的， 法定的； 正当合理的， 合情合理的
definitionEn: fair or reasonable
example: That’s a perfectly legitimate question.

definitionZh: n  间隔时间； 间距； 幕间休息
definitionEn: the period of time between two events, activities etc
example: He left the room, returning after a short interval with a message.

definitionZh: ad&conj  借以， 凭
example: We need this system whereby a new plan may arise.

definitionZh: vt  评价， 估计
definitionEn: to judge how good, useful, or successful something is
example: You should be able to evaluate your own work.

definitionZh: n  身份， 地位； 情况
definitionEn: the official legal position or condition of a person, group, country etc
example: These documents have no legal status in Britain.

definitionZh: v 渗出，慢慢流出；洋溢着，充满; n  泥浆； 缓慢渗出
definitionEn: if a thick liquid oozes from something or if something oozes a thick liquid, that liquid flows from it very slowly; a slow flowing or leaking
example: A cut on his cheek was still oozing blood.

definitionZh: n  名望， 声誉
definitionEn: when you are famous and a lot of people admire you for a special skill, achievement, or quality
example: He achieved some renown as a football player.

definitionZh: adj  语义的
definitionEn: relating to the meanings of words
example: He did not want to enter into a semantic debate.

definitionZh: adj  心烦意乱的； 不适的; vt  使心烦意乱； 颠覆， 推翻； 搅乱; n  困扰， 麻烦； 出乎意料的结局； 苦恼
definitionEn: unhappy and worried because something unpleasant or disappointing has happened; to make someone feel unhappy or worried; worry and unhappiness caused by an unexpected problem
example: You’re not still upset with me, are you?

definitionZh: n  散布， 扩散； 传播
example: Dissemination, as of news; diffusion.

definitionZh: v 弄弯，成曲线形; n  曲线； 曲线图； 弯曲
definitionEn: to bend or move in the shape of a curve, or to make something do this; a line that gradually bends like part of a circle
example: The track curved round the side of the hill.

definitionZh: v 星罗棋布于；打点于；点缀; n  点， 圆点； 小数点
definitionEn: if an area is dotted with things, there are a lot of them there but they are spread far apart; a small round mark or spot
example: Poppies dotted the field.

definitionZh: v  撇去； 掠过， 擦过； 浏览， 略读
definitionEn: to remove something from the surface of a liquid, especially floating fat, solids, or oil
example: Julie skimmed the sports page.

definitionZh: v 跳；跳过，略过，漏过；不出席; n  跳； 跳过
definitionEn: to not do something that you usually do or that you should do; a skipping movement
example: She skipped lunch in order to go shopping.

definitionZh: v  散布， 传播
definitionEn: to spread information or ideas to as many people as possible
example: Her findings have been widely disseminated .

definitionZh: v  溶解， 液化
definitionEn: to become liquid, or make something become liquid
example: A process that is used to liquefy nitrogen.

definitionZh: n  大批离去， 成群外出
definitionEn: If there is an exodus of people from a place, a lot of people leave that place at the same time
example: The medical system is facing collapse because of an exodus of doctors.

definitionZh: v  提及， 说起
definitionEn: to talk or write about something or someone, usually quickly and without saying very much or giving details
example: Was my name mentioned at all?

definitionZh: v 涌; n  溪流； 串， 股
definitionEn: to flow quickly and in great amounts; a long and almost continuous series of events, people, objects etc
example: A stream of cold air rushed through the open door.

definitionZh: n  洗衣店， 洗衣房； 洗好的衣服； 待洗的衣服
definitionEn: clothes, sheets etc that need to be washed or have just been washed
example: She did the laundry (= washed the clothes etc ) and hung it out to dry.

definitionZh: n  离题， 扯到枝节上； 题外话， 枝节内容
v  勉强做； 不情愿地给; n 怨恨，积怨
definitionEn: to do or give something very unwillingly; a feeling of dislike for someone because you cannot forget that they harmed you in the past
example: Mr Gillis was not normally a man to bear grudges .

definitionZh: vt 预示；宣布，宣告; n  信使； 预示， 预兆
definitionEn: to be a sign of something that is going to come or happen soon; Something that is a herald of a future event or situation is a sign that it is going to happen or appear
example: A flash of lightning heralded torrential rain.

definitionZh: v  积累， 积聚， 堆积
definitionEn: to gradually get more and more money, possessions, knowledge etc over a period of time
example: It is unjust that a privileged few should continue to accumulate wealth.

definitionZh: n  联盟， 同盟； 结合， 联合
definitionEn: a union of two or more political parties that allows them to form a government or fight an election together
example: the centre-right coalition government

definitionZh: adj 矮小的; vt 使显得矮小，使相形见绌; n  侏儒， 矮人
definitionEn: a dwarf plant or animal is much smaller than the usual size; to be so big that other things are made to seem very small; an imaginary creature that looks like a small man
example: a dwarf conifer

definitionZh: n  犯罪； 罪行
definitionEn: illegal activities in general
example: We moved here because there was very little crime.

definitionZh: n  空闲， 闲暇
definitionEn: time when you are not working or studying and can relax and do things you enjoy
example: Most people now enjoy shorter working hours and more leisure time.

definitionZh: v  包围， 圈住； 围绕， 环绕
definitionEn: to be all around someone or something on every side
example: He glared at the people who surrounded the tent.

definitionZh: vt&n  损坏， 损毁
definitionEn: to make something less attractive or enjoyable
example: Their wedding was marred by the death of Jenny’s mother a week earlier.

definitionZh: n  垫子
definitionEn: a small piece of thick rough material which covers part of a floor
example: Wipe your feet on the mat.

definitionZh: adv 向前；; vt 发送；转交，转递
definitionEn: towards a place or position that is in front of you; to send letters, goods etc to someone when they have moved to a different address
example: He leaned forward , his elbows resting on the table.

definitionZh: n  黑色素
definitionEn: a natural dark brown colour in human skin, hair, and eyes
example: If cure is undeserved, activationed its melanin cell, sequential meeting is more serious ah.

definitionZh: v  透彻理解， 吸收， 消化； 同化
definitionEn: to completely understand and begin to use new ideas, information etc
example: It will take time to assimilate all these facts.

definitionZh: adj  道德的
definitionEn: morally good or correct
example: I don’t think it’s ethical for you to accept a job you know you can’t do.

definitionZh: adj  狂热的， 热烈的， 充满激情的
definitionEn: someone who is zealous does or supports something with great energy
example: a zealous preacher

definitionZh: adj  可比较的， 类似的； 比得上的
definitionEn: similar to something else in size, number, quality etc, so that you can make a comparison
example: A car of comparable size would cost far more abroad.

definitionZh: n 鱼饵，诱饵; vt  下诱饵； 激怒
definitionEn: food used to attract fish, animals, or birds so that you can catch them; If you bait a hook or trap, you put bait on it or in it
example: We used worms as bait.

definitionZh: n 邮件; vt  邮寄
definitionEn: the letters and packages that are delivered to you; to send a letter or package to someone
example: You shouldn’t read other people’s mail.

definitionZh: adj  …度空间的
example: Of particular note is the deviation threshold parameter and the dimensional shift parameters.

definitionZh: adj  受…支配的; n 主题；对象; vt  使服从
definitionEn: if someone or something is subject to something, especially something bad, it is possible or likely that they will be affected by it; the thing you are talking about or considering in a conversation, discussion, book, film etc; to force a country or group of people to be ruled by you, and control them very strictly
example: All flights are subject to delay.

definitionZh: n  承认， 认同； 认出， 识别， 辨认； 赏识
definitionEn: the act of realizing and accepting that something is true or important
example: He stared at her, but there was no sign of recognition .

definitionZh: n  无兴趣， 冷漠； 客观， 公正
definitionEn: a lack of interest
example: The fact that Liberia has no oil seems to explain foreign disinterest in its internal affairs.

definitionZh: vi&n  猛冲， 猛扑
definitionEn: to make a sudden strong movement towards someone or something, especially to attack them
example: He lunged at me, grabbing me violently.

definitionZh: v  召集， 召开； 聚集， 集合
definitionEn: if a group of people convene, or someone convenes them, they come together, especially for a formal meeting
example: a report by experts convened by the National Institutes of Health

definitionZh: n  收入； 税收
definitionEn: money that a business or organization receives over a period of time, especially from selling goods or services
example: advertising revenue

definitionZh: vt 剥夺，剥掉；脱去…的衣服; n  条， 带状物； 条纹
definitionEn: to remove something that is covering the surface of something else; a long narrow piece of paper, cloth etc
example: Strip the beds and wash the sheets.

definitionZh: n  垄断， 专卖； 垄断商品， 专卖商品； 独占， 专利
definitionEn: if a company or government has a monopoly of a business or political activity, it has complete control of it so that other organizations cannot compete with it
example: a monopoly in copper trading

definitionZh: n  商议， 谈判； 流通
definitionEn: official discussions between the repre­sentatives of opposing groups who are trying to reach an agreement, especially in business or politics
example: Warren said, "We have had meaningful negotiations and I believe we are very close to a deal."

definitionZh: n  谷物； 颗粒； 纹理； 少量
definitionEn: the natural lines you can see in a substance such as wood, which are the result of its structure
example: ...a grain of wheat.

definitionZh: vt 把…归于; n  荣誉； 学分； 信用； 贷款
definitionEn: if something is credited to someone or something, they have achieved it or are the reason for it; an arrangement with a shop, bank etc that allows you to buy something and pay for it later
example: Much of Manchester United’s success can be credited to their manager.

definitionZh: n  氧， 氧气
definitionEn: a gas that has no colour or smell, is present in air, and is necessary for most animals and plants to live. It is a chemical element: symbol O
example: The human brain needs to be without oxygen for only four minutes before permanent damage occurs.

definitionZh: v  联合， 结合
definitionEn: if you combine two or more different things, or if they combine, they begin to exist or work together
example: Diets are most effective when combined with exercise.

definitionZh: vt  改变
definitionEn: to change, or to make someone or something change
example: Her face hadn’t altered much over the years.

definitionZh: adj  欺诈的， 欺骗性的
definitionEn: intended to deceive people in an illegal way, in order to gain money, power etc
example: a fraudulent insurance claim

definitionZh: adj 无用的，废弃的；荒芜的; n 浪费；废料，废弃物; vt  浪费， 消耗
definitionEn: waste materials, substances etc are unwanted because the good part of them has been removed; when something such as money or skills are not used in a way that is effective, useful, or sensible; to use more money, time, energy etc than is useful or sensible
example: excessive waste in state spending

definitionZh: n  接近； 近似值
definitionEn: a number, amount etc that is not exact, but is almost correct
example: That is a fair approximation of the way in which the next boss is being chosen.

definitionZh: n  音节
definitionEn: a word or part of a word which contains a single vowel sound
example: Which syllable does the stress of this word fall on?

definitionZh: n  喜剧； 喜剧性， 滑稽， 幽默
definitionEn: entertainment that is intended to make people laugh
example: a career in stand-up comedy

definitionZh: n  有文化， 有教养； 读写能力
definitionEn: the state of being able to read and write
example: a new adult literacy campaign

definitionZh: v  起源； 发起； 创立
definitionEn: to come from a particular place or start in a particular situation
example: How did the plan originate?

definitionZh: n 罗盘，罗盘仪；
definitionEn: an instrument that shows directions and has a needle that always points north
example: a map and compass

definitionZh: n  独奏者， 独唱者， 单独表演者
definitionEn: a musician who performs alone or plays an instrument alone
example: cello soloist Yo Yo Ma

definitionZh: adv  虽然如此， 但是， 依然
definitionEn: in spite of the fact that has just been mentioned
example: The region was extremely beautiful. Nonetheless Gerard could not imagine spending the rest of his life there.

definitionZh: v  安排， 布置； 使倾向于
definitionEn: to deal with or settle
example: Chinese vases are disposed around the gallery.

definitionZh: vt  使惊慌， 使不安； 使困惑
definitionEn: to make someone feel slightly confused, embarrassed, or worried
example: His compliments disconcerted her a little.

definitionZh: n  宪法， 章程； 体质； 构成
definitionEn: a set of basic laws and principles that a country or organization is governed by
example: The right to speak freely is written into the Constitution of the United States.

definitionZh: n  范例， 典范

example: ...a new paradigm of production.

definitionZh: v 混合，混杂; n  混合； 混合物
definitionEn: to thoroughly mix together soft or liquid substances to form a single smooth substance; a product such as tea, tobacco, or  whisky  that is a mixture of several different types
example: Blend the sugar, eggs, and flour.

definitionZh: v  把表演得过火； 表现做作
definitionEn: to act in a play with too much emotion or movement – used to show disapproval

definitionZh: n  忠诚， 忠实； 精确， 逼真
definitionEn: when you are loyal to your husband, girlfriend etc, by not having sex with anyone else
example: the importance of marital fidelity

definitionZh: v  构思， 构想， 设想； 怀孕
definitionEn: to imagine a particular situation or to think about something in a particular way

definitionZh: n  袭击， 突然入侵； 介入
definitionEn: a sudden attack into an area that belongs to other people

definitionZh: n  胡说， 废话； 冒失的行为

definitionZh: v 沾污；留下污渍; n  污点， 污渍
definitionEn: to accidentally make a mark on something, especially one that cannot be removed, or to be marked in this way; a mark that is difficult to remove, especially one made by a liquid such as blood, coffee, or ink
example: Be careful you don’t stain the carpet.

definitionZh: v  畏缩； 阻止； 妨碍; n 障碍
definitionEn: to stop someone or something from getting or achieving what they want
example: Even biology undergraduates may balk at animal experiments.

definitionZh: n  电极
definitionEn: a small piece of metal or a wire that is used to send electricity through a system or through a person’s body
example: The monkeys have electrodes implanted into the brain to measure their brain activity.

definitionZh: adj  空气传播的； 空运的
definitionEn: airborne soldiers are trained to fight in areas that they get to by jumping out of a plane
example: airborne pollutants

definitionZh: adj  轻率的， 鲁莽的， 无所顾忌的
definitionEn: not caring or worrying about the possible bad or dangerous results of your actions
example: He was accused of causing death by reckless driving .

definitionZh: v  睡过头； 睡得过久
definitionEn: to sleep for longer than you intended
example: Sorry I'm late. I overslept.

definitionZh: adj  光秃的， 秃头的； 简单的， 单调的
definitionEn: having little or no hair on your head
example: a bald man

definitionZh: n  似非而是的论点； 自相矛盾的话
definitionEn: a situation that seems strange because it involves two ideas or qualities that are very different
example: It’s a paradox that in such a rich country there can be so much poverty.

definitionZh: n  清唱剧， 宗教剧
definitionEn: a long piece of music in which a large group of people sing
example: Its peaks are the symphony and the oratorio.

definitionZh: n  X射线， X光； X光照片
definitionEn: a beam of radiation1 that can go through solid objects and is used for photographing the inside of the body
example: The X-ray showed that her leg was not broken.

definitionZh: adj 物理的；物质的，有形的；身体的，肉体的; n  体检
definitionEn: related to someone’s body rather than their mind or emotions; a thorough examination of someone’s body by a doctor, in order to discover whether they are healthy or have any illnesses or medical problems
example: She was in constant physical pain.

definitionZh: vt  将…分类， 把…加以分类
definitionEn: to put people or things into groups according to the type of person or thing they are
example: The population is categorized according to age, sex, and social group.

definitionZh: n  躁狂； 狂热； 癖好
definitionEn: a strong desire for something or interest in something, especially one that affects a lot of people at the same time
example: The mania for dinosaurs began in the late 1800s.

definitionZh: adj  诗歌的； 诗意的
definitionEn: relating to poetry, or typical of poetry
example: poetic expression

definitionZh: adj  反对的； 截然不同的
definitionEn: two ideas that are opposed to each other are completely different from each other
example: The principles of capitalism and socialism are diametrically opposed (= completely opposite ).

definitionZh: vt  使熟悉
definitionEn: to learn about something so that you understand it, or to teach someone else about something so that they understand it
example: Employees must familiarize themselves with the health and safety manual.

definitionZh: n  分派， 分摊， 分配
definitionEn: the act of apportioning

definitionZh: v 穿；穿过，通过; n  线； 线索； 思路
definitionEn: to put a thread, string, rope etc through a hole; a long thin string of cotton, silk etc used to sew or weave cloth
example: Will you thread the needle for me?

definitionZh: n  登记， 注册； 入学
adj  专制的， 残暴的， 专横的
definitionEn: behaving in a cruel and unfair way towards someone you have power over
example: a tyrannical parent

definitionZh: n 股份；赌注；利害关系; vt  以…打赌， 拿…冒险
definitionEn: if you have a stake in a business, you have  invested  money in it; to risk losing something that is valuable or important to you on the result of something
example: Young people don’t feel they have a stake in the country’s future.

definitionZh: vt  支持， 给…以勇气； 加强， 增强； 筑防御工事于
definitionEn: to build towers, walls etc around an area or city in order to defend it
example: The town was heavily fortified.

definitionZh: adj  到期的； 预期的； 应得的； 恰当的， 适当的； 应支付的
definitionEn: expected to happen or arrive at a particular time
example: Any money due you will be sent by cheque through the post.

definitionZh: v  成熟
definitionEn: to become ripe or to make something ripe
example: The apples were ripening on the trees.

definitionZh: vi  遵守， 服从； 符合； 适应
definitionEn: to obey a law, rule etc
example: the pressure on schoolchildren to conform

definitionZh: v  烘， 烤， 焙
definitionEn: to cook something using dry heat, in an  oven
example: I’m baking some bread.

definitionZh: adj  真正的， 真实的； 逼真的； 可靠的
definitionEn: based on facts
example: an authentic account

definitionZh: n  蛋白石
definitionEn: a type of white stone with changing colours in it, often used in jewellery

definitionZh: v  正式提出； 租住， 借宿； 为…提供住宿； 寄存; n 巢穴；旅社；乡间小屋
definitionEn: to provide someone with a place to stay for a short time; a small house on the land of a large country house, usually at the main entrance gate
example: a building used to lodge prisoners of war

definitionZh: n  恐吓， 威胁； 坏兆头， 危险迹象
definitionEn: a statement in which you tell someone that you will cause them harm or trouble if they do not do what you want
example: Your threats don’t scare me.

definitionZh: n  人造丝， 人造纤维
definitionEn: a smooth artificial cloth used for making clothes
example: a rayon shirt

definitionZh: adj  全无的
definitionEn: to be completely lacking in something
example: His face was devoid of any warmth or humour.

definitionZh: n  宽恕； 仁慈； 恩惠， 幸运
definitionEn: if someone shows mercy, they choose to forgive or to be kind to someone who they have the power to hurt or punish
example: He showed no mercy to his enemies.

definitionZh: v 卷曲，蜷缩; n  卷发； 卷曲状； 卷曲物
definitionEn: If your hair curls or if you curl it, it is full of curls; a piece of hair that hangs in a curved shape
example: She has hair that refuses to curl.

definitionZh: vt  通知， 通告； 了解， 熟悉； 告发， 检举， 告密
definitionEn: If you inform someone of something, you tell them about it
example: They would inform him of any progress they had made.

definitionZh: v  依靠， 依赖； 取决于
definitionEn: If you depend on someone or something, you need them in order to be able to survive physically, financially, or emotionally
example: He depended on his writing for his income.

definitionZh: n  缺乏， 短缺

definitionZh: vt  承诺； 犯错； 犯罪； 忠于
definitionEn: to do something wrong or illegal
example: Women commit fewer crimes than men.

definitionZh: vt 修补，打补丁; n  小片， 小块； 补丁； 小块土地

definitionZh: n  职位； 任期
definitionEn: the position of being the president of a country or organization, or the period of time during which someone is president
example: Roosevelt was elected four times to the presidency of the US.

definitionZh: vi&n  急跑， 疾行
definitionEn: to move quickly with short steps, especially because you are in a hurry
example: People were scurrying off to work.

definitionZh: adj  轻蔑的， 鄙视的
definitionEn: feeling or showing scorn
example: a scornful look

definitionZh: n  胆固醇
definitionEn: a chemical substance found in your blood. Too much cholesterol in your body may cause heart disease.
example: So why would you want to lower your cholesterol?

definitionZh: adj  磁的， 磁石的； 有磁性的； 有吸引力的
definitionEn: concerning or produced by  magnetism
example: magnetic forces

definitionZh: v 刺，戳，插；粘住，粘贴；放置；卡住; n  棍， 棒； 手杖
definitionEn: to attach something to something else using a substance, or to become attached to a surface; a long, specially shaped piece of wood, plastic etc that you use in some sports to hit a ball
example: This stamp won’t stick properly.

definitionZh: v  作轨道运行; n 轨道；势力范围
definitionEn: to travel in a curved path around a much larger object such as the Earth, the Sun etc; the curved path travelled by an object which is moving around another much larger object such as the Earth, the Sun etc
example: The satellite orbits the Earth every 48 hours.

definitionZh: vi 联合，集合; n  乐队； 群， 伙； 带； 波段， 频带

example: We band together to resist our enemy.

definitionZh: adj  有益的； 行善的， 慈善的
definitionEn: helping people, or resulting in something good
example: the beneficent properties of natural remedies

definitionZh: vt  包含； 由…组成
definitionEn: to consist of particular parts, groups etc
example: The house comprises two bedrooms, a kitchen, and a living room.

definitionZh: adj  适度的； 温和的； 普通的; v 缓和，使适中; n  持温和意见的人
definitionEn: not very large or very small, very hot or very cold, very fast or very slow etc; If you moderate something or if it moderates, it becomes less extreme or violent and easier to deal with or accept; someone whose opinions or beliefs, especially about politics, are not extreme and are considered reasonable by most people
example: Even moderate amounts of alcohol can be dangerous.

definitionZh: adj 常驻的；居住的; n  居民； 住宿者， 旅客； 住院实习医生

definitionZh: n  剧变， 动乱， 大变动

definitionZh: n  接收器； 听筒； 接收者； 官方接管人

definitionZh: n  镀金； 贴金层， 镀金层； 金色涂层

example: A thin layer of gold or something simulating gold that is applied in gilding.

definitionZh: vt  执行， 履行， 实施； 将…处死， 处决； 完成

definitionZh: adj  实质的； 坚固的； 可观的， 大量的

definitionZh: n  香脂油， 药膏； 镇痛剂， 安慰剂

definitionZh: adj 旧石器时代的; n  旧石器时代

definitionZh: v  受益； 得益于; n 益处，好处；恩惠；津贴
definitionEn: if you benefit from something, or it benefits you, it gives you an advantage, improves your life, or helps you in some way; an advantage, improvement, or help that you get from something

definitionZh: adj  优良的， 优质的; n 质，质量；品德，品质；性质，特性

definitionZh: adj  唯一的； 独特的， 罕见的； 特有的

definitionZh: vt 提高，推进；替…做广告，宣扬; n  增加， 帮助

definitionZh: adj 清醒的，未醉的；持重的，冷静的；素净的; v  清醒； 变得冷静
definitionEn: not drunk; to become more serious in behaviour or attitude, or to make someone become more serious
example: He’s a nice guy when he’s sober.

definitionZh: adj 雄的，公的；
definitionEn: a male person or animal cannot have babies or lay eggs
example: adult male bears

definitionZh: adj  母亲的， 母系的
definitionEn: typical of the way a good mother behaves or feels

definitionZh: adj  多产的； 富有创造力的
definitionEn: a prolific artist, writer etc produces many works of art, books etc

definitionZh: vt  开除； 驱逐； 排出
definitionEn: to officially force someone to leave a school or organization

definitionZh: n 掩蔽处，庇护所；居所，住所；掩蔽，保护; vt  保护， 掩蔽； 躲避

definitionZh: n  外部性， 外界效应

definitionZh: n 纬度；

definitionZh: n  活力， 精力
example: They are here to drink in vigor from the youth.

definitionZh: vt 细察，审视；扫描；粗略地看，浏览; n  扫描检查； 浏览

example: He scanned the horizon, but there was no sign of the ship.

definitionZh: n  勤劳， 勤奋； 工业， 行业
definitionEn: businesses that produce a particular type of thing or provide a particular service
example: I work in the oil industry.

definitionZh: vt  消除； 淘汰
definitionEn: to completely get rid of something that is unnecessary or unwanted

definitionZh: vt  增加， 提高
definitionEn: to increase the value, amount, effectiveness etc of something
example: Any surplus was sold to augment their income.

definitionZh: adj  切线的， 相切的; n 切线；正切
definitionEn: a straight line that touches the outside of a curve but does not cut across it

definitionZh: adj  良性的； 有利的； 善良的， 和蔼的

definitionZh: n  毁坏， 毁灭
definitionEn: the act or process of destroying something or of being destroyed
example: {"COLLOINEXA":["weapons of mass destruction"]}

definitionZh: vt  宣告无罪； 表现
definitionEn: to give a decision in a court of law that someone is not guilty of a crime

definitionZh: adv  极其， 非常； 僵硬地; adj 硬的，僵直的；呆板的；拘谨的；艰难的，费劲的；强烈的

definitionZh: vi  繁荣， 兴旺； 成功
definitionEn: if people or businesses prosper, they grow and develop in a successful way, especially by becoming rich or making a large profit

definitionZh: n  暴风雪， 大风雪
definitionEn: a severe snowstorm
example: We got stuck in a blizzard.

definitionZh: vi 上诉，起诉；呼吁，恳求；吸引; n  上诉， 申诉； 呼吁， 恳求； 感染力， 吸引力
definitionEn: to make a serious public request for help, money, information etc; an urgent request for something important

definitionZh: n 沼泽地，湿地; vt  使陷入， 淹没； 使应接不暇， 使疲于应对

definitionZh: n  企业家； 承包人
definitionEn: someone who starts a new business or arranges business deals in order to make money, often in a way that involves financial risks
example: How would you define personal growth as an entrepreneur?

definitionZh: n  运输； 运输系统， 运输工具
definitionEn: a system or method for carrying passengers or goods from one place to another
example: The city needs to improve its public transportation (= buses, trains etc ) .

definitionZh: vt  致力于， 奉献给； 题献词于上
definitionEn: to give all your attention and effort to one particular thing
example: She dedicated her first album to Woody Allen, who she says understands her obsession.

definitionZh: v  染色; n 颜料，染料
definitionEn: to give something a different colour using a dye; a substance you use to change the colour of your clothes, hair etc
example: The women prepared, spun, and dyed the wool.

definitionZh: adj  广大的， 广阔的； 广泛的， 大量的
definitionEn: large in size, amount, or degree
example: The house stands in extensive grounds.

definitionZh: adj  单调的， 无聊的

definitionZh: vt  取消； 否定
definitionEn: to prevent something from having any effect

definitionZh: vt  传授； 传达； 给予
definitionEn: to give a particular quality to something
example: She had information that she couldn’t wait to impart.

definitionZh: vt  鼓舞， 激励； 给…以灵感
definitionEn: to encourage someone by making them feel confident and eager to do something
example: We need someone who can inspire the team.

definitionZh: n  官僚主义， 官僚作风； 政府机构， 官僚机构
definitionEn: a complicated official system that is annoying or confusing because it has a lot of rules, processes etc
example: the reduction of unnecessary bureaucracy

definitionZh: n  几何， 几何学

definitionZh: vt  为…付出； 献身于
definitionEn: to use a particular area, period of time, or amount of space for a specific purpose
example: He decided to devote the rest of his life to scientific investigation.

definitionZh: adj  美味可口的； 有吸引力的； 令人喜爱的， 赏心悦目的
definitionEn: extremely pleasant to taste or smell
example: Delectable smells rose from the kitchen.

definitionZh: n  鱼钩， 倒钩； 挖苦的话

definitionZh: n 校友，毕业生

definitionZh: adj  牵强的

definitionZh: adj  大约的， 近似的; vt  接近， 近似

definitionZh: n  能工巧匠， 手艺人， 工艺师
definitionEn: someone who is very skilled at a particular  craft

definitionZh: v  放映； 规划； 预测， 推想; n  方案； 课题， 项目； 工程

definitionZh: adj  越轨的； 异常的

definitionZh: vi 轻松地大步跑; n  轻快的步伐
definitionEn: to run easily with long steps

definitionZh: adj  侧面的， 旁边的； 横向的
definitionEn: relating to the sides of something, or movement to the side
example: The wall is weak and requires lateral support.

definitionZh: n  内地， 腹地； 内地贸易区
definitionEn: an area of land that is far from the coast, large rivers, or the places where people live

definitionZh: vt  任命， 指定； 提名， 推荐
definitionEn: to officially suggest someone or something for an important position, duty, or prize

definitionZh: v 踏，践踏；行走; n  轮胎面； 脚步声； 步法
definitionEn: to put your foot on or in something while you are walking; the pattern of lines on the part of a tyre that touches the road

definitionZh: n  直径

definitionZh: adj  静止的； 固定的， 稳定的， 不变的
definitionEn: standing still instead of moving
example: How did you manage to drive into a stationary vehicle?

definitionZh: n  谷仓； 牲口棚
definitionEn: a large farm building for storing crops, or for keeping animals in

definitionZh: v  吠叫； 厉声质问; n 树皮；犬吠声

definitionZh: n  狗窝； 养狗场

example: Once you have chosen a kennel, make a booking for your pet.

definitionZh: n  椭圆， 椭圆形
definitionEn: a curved shape like a circle, but with two slightly longer and flatter sides
example: The Earth orbits in an ellipse.

definitionZh: adj 赤裸的；光秃的，无遮盖的；最基本的; vt  脱掉； 显露
definitionEn: not covered by clothes

definitionZh: n  人行道
definitionEn: a hard surface or path at the side of a street for people to walk on
example: She walked along the sidewalk.

definitionZh: adj  难对付的； 强大的； 令人敬畏的
definitionEn: very powerful or impressive, and often frightening
example: The building is grey, formidable, not at all picturesque.

definitionZh: vi  富于； 大量存在； 充满
definitionEn: to exist in very large numbers
example: Rumours abound as to the reasons for his resignation.

definitionZh: n  手提箱， 衣箱
definitionEn: a large case with a handle, used for carrying clothes and possessions when you travel
example: It did not take Andrew long to pack a suitcase.

definitionZh: vt  使倒转， 使倒置， 使颠倒
definitionEn: to put something in the opposite position to the one it was in before, especially by turning it upside down (= the bottom is on the top and the top is on the bottom )
example: Invert the cake onto a serving plate.

definitionZh: adj  分离的， 个别的； 离散的
definitionEn: clearly separate
example: The change happens in a series of discrete steps.

definitionZh: adj  气候温和的， 温带的； 温和的， 自我克制的
definitionEn: behaviour that is temperate is calm and sensible
example: The Nile Valley keeps a temperate climate throughout the year.

definitionZh: adj  不可改变的， 永恒不变的
definitionEn: never changing or impossible to change
example: This decision should not be seen as immutable.

definitionZh: vt  使中断； 扰乱； 使分裂， 使瓦解
definitionEn: to prevent something from continuing in its usual way by causing problems
example: Traffic was disrupted by a hoax bomb.

definitionZh: vt 给…留下疤痕；给…留下精神创伤；损害…的外观; n  疤痕； 创伤
definitionEn: if a wound or cut scars you, it leaves a permanent mark on your body; a permanent mark that is left on your skin after you have had a cut or wound
example: His hands were badly scarred by the fire.

definitionZh: v  夭折， 中止； 使流产
definitionEn: to deliberately end a  pregnancy  when the baby is still too young to live
example: The rescue mission had to be aborted.

definitionZh: adj  假设的
definitionEn: based on a situation that is not real, but that might happen
example: The question is purely hypothetical .

definitionZh: n  系数
definitionEn: the number by which an unknown quantity is multiplied
example: In 8pq, the coefficient of pq is 8.

definitionZh: vi 交谈，会话; adj 逆向的，相反的; n  相反的事物； 反面
definitionEn: to have a conversation with someone; opposite; the converse of a fact, word, statement etc is the opposite of it
example: It lets me converse with the distinct voices of my past and quilt together a narrative about movement in place.

definitionZh: n  准则， 信条； 绝对真理； [G-]福音； 福音音乐； 训示
definitionEn: one of the four books in the Bible about Christ’s life
example: the Gospel according to St Luke

definitionZh: adj  古怪的， 反常的; n 古怪的人
definitionEn: behaving in a way that is unusual and different from most people; someone who behaves in a way that is different from what is usual or socially accepted
example: His eccentric behaviour lost him his job.

definitionZh: n  用具， 器具； 装置
definitionEn: a piece of equipment, especially electrical equipment, such as a  cooker  or  washing machine  , used in people’s homes
example: He could also learn to use the vacuum cleaner, the washing machine and other household appliances.

definitionZh: n  合金; vt  使成合金
definitionEn: a metal that consists of two or more metals mixed together; to mix one metal with another
example: Brass is an alloy of copper and zinc.

definitionZh: v  推迟， 延期
definitionEn: to delay something until a later date
example: The committee deferred their decision .

definitionZh: adj  昏昏欲睡的； 催眠的
definitionEn: tired and almost asleep
example: The drug can make you drowsy.

definitionZh: n  学问， 学识； 传说， 传统
definitionEn: knowledge or information about a subject, for example nature or magic, that is not written down but is passed from person to person
example: According to local lore, a ghost still haunts the castle.

definitionZh: n  船桅； 旗杆； 天线塔
definitionEn: a tall pole on which the sails or flags on a ship are hung
example: a radio mast

definitionZh: adj  大量的; n 质量；块，团；众多；群众，平民百姓
definitionEn: involving or intended for a very large number of people; all the ordinary people in society who do not have power or influence
example: a mass protest

definitionZh: adj  闷热的
definitionEn: muggy weather is unpleasantly warm and the air seems wet
example: It was muggy and overcast.

definitionZh: vt  撤销， 撤回； 取消， 废除
definitionEn: to officially state that a law, decision, or agreement is no longer effective
example: Their work permits have been revoked.

definitionZh: adj  正确的； 合乎体统的， 适当的； 固有的， 特有的
definitionEn: right, suitable, or correct
example: Everything was in its proper place (= where it should be ) .

definitionZh: n  [the R-] 文艺复兴， 文艺复兴时期； 复兴， 再生
definitionEn: a new interest in something, especially a particular form of art, music etc, that has not been popular for a long period
example: ...the Renaissance masterpieces in London's galleries.

definitionZh: adj  有毒的， 有害的； 恶毒的
definitionEn: containing poison or producing poison
example: Some mushrooms are extremely poisonous.

definitionZh: n&v  拍卖
definitionEn: a public meeting where land, buildings, paintings etc are sold to the person who offers the most money for them
example: The painting is expected to fetch up to $400,000 at auction.

definitionZh: vt  分配， 配给， 拨给
definitionEn: to use a particular amount of time for something, or give a particular share of money, space etc to someone or something
example: The seats are allotted to the candidates who have won the most votes.

definitionZh: vt  推进， 驱使； 激励
definitionEn: to move, drive, or push something forward
example: a boat propelled by a small motor

definitionZh: v  承认； 准许…进入， 接纳
definitionEn: to agree unwillingly that something is true or that someone else is right
example: ‘Okay, so maybe I was a little bit scared,’ Jenny admitted.

definitionZh: adj  猖獗的， 肆虐的； 蔓生的
definitionEn: if something bad, such as crime or disease, is rampant, there is a lot of it and it is very difficult to control
example: Pickpocketing is rampant in the downtown area.

definitionZh: n 兴趣，关注；业余爱好；利息；利害关系; vt  使感兴趣， 引起…关注
definitionEn: if you have an interest in something or someone, you want to know or learn more about them; to make someone want to pay attention to something and find out more about it
example: I watched the first few episodes, but soon lost interest.

definitionZh: adj  不平均的； 不平坦的； 不规则的； 不势均力敌的； 不公平的
definitionEn: not smooth, flat, or level
example: She walked back carefully over the uneven ground.

definitionZh: n  嫩枝， 小枝
definitionEn: a small very thin stem of wood that grows from a branch on a tree
example: There is the bird, sitting on a twig halfway up the tree.

definitionZh: adj  未成熟的， 未充分发展的
definitionEn: not fully formed or developed
example: measures to protect immature whales

definitionZh: adj  有机的； 器官的； 有机体的
definitionEn: relating to farming or gardening methods of growing food without using artificial chemicals, or produced or grown by these methods
example: Organic farming is better for the environment.

definitionZh: adj  贞洁的； 简朴的， 朴实的
definitionEn: not having sex with anyone, or not with anyone except your husband or wife
example: She led a chaste decent life.

definitionZh: n 面具；面罩；假面具，
definitionEn: something that covers all or part of your face, to protect or to hide it
example: a surgical face mask

definitionZh: n  撤离
example: I ordered the evacuation of all Americans and sent troops to guarantee their safety.

definitionZh: n  资助人， 赞助人； 老主顾， 顾客
definitionEn: someone who supports the activities of an organization, for example by giving money
example: a wealthy patron

definitionZh: v  申请， 请求； 适用； 应用， 运用； 涂， 敷， 施
definitionEn: to make a formal request, usually written, for something such as a job, a place at a university, or permission to do something
example: We need to apply for planning permission to build a garage.

definitionZh: v  炖， 煨； 思考； 不安， 担忧; n 炖菜；不安，担忧
definitionEn: to cook something slowly in liquid
example: stewed apples

definitionZh: vt  俯瞰， 眺望； 忽略； 对…不予考虑
definitionEn: to not notice something, or not see how important it is
example: It is easy to overlook a small detail like that.

definitionZh: adj  惊人的， 难以置信的
definitionEn: too strange to be believed, or very difficult to believe
example: It’s incredible that he survived the fall.

definitionZh: n  编排， 版面设计； 规划， 布局
definitionEn: the way in which something such as a town, garden, or building is arranged
example: All the flats in the building had the same layout.

definitionZh: n  登陆； 着陆， 降落
definitionEn: the action of bringing an aircraft down to the ground after being in the air
example: take-off and landing procedures

definitionZh: n  公式， 方程式； 分子式； 配方
definitionEn: a series of numbers or letters that represent a mathematical or scientific rule
example: the formula for calculating distance

definitionZh: n&v  雪崩； 山崩
definitionEn: a large mass of snow, ice, and rocks that falls down the side of a mountain
example: Two skiers were killed in the avalanche.

definitionZh: v 反叛，反抗；违抗；厌恶，反感; n  起义， 叛乱， 反抗
definitionEn: if people revolt, they take strong and often violent action against the government, usually with the aim of taking power away from them; a refusal to accept someone’s authority or obey rules or laws
example: He was revolted by the smell.

definitionZh: vt  厌恶， 嫌恶
definitionEn: To disgust someone means to make them feel a strong sense of dislike and disapproval
example: He disgusted many with his boorish behaviour.

definitionZh: n  贡品； 颂词， 称赞； 悼念， 致哀； 礼物
definitionEn: something that you say, do, or give in order to express your respect or admiration for someone
example: The players wore black armbands as a tribute to their late teammate.

definitionZh: vt  危及， 危害
definitionEn: to put someone or something in danger of being hurt, damaged, or destroyed
example: Smoking during pregnancy endangers your baby’s life.

definitionZh: adj  卑鄙的， 不道德的; vt 把设在；
definitionEn: not having good moral principles; to have your main place of work, business etc in a particular place
example: base attitudes and desires

definitionZh: vt 阻止，遏制；起源; n  茎， 干
definitionEn: to stop something from happening, spreading, or developing; the long thin part of a plant, from which leaves, flowers, or fruit grow
example: A tight bandage should stem the bleeding.

definitionZh: adj 次要的；下级的; vt  使处于次要地位， 使从属于; n  部属， 下属
definitionEn: in a less important position than someone else; to put someone or something in a less important position; someone who has a lower position and less authority than someone else in an organization
example: a subordinate officer

definitionZh: n  趋势， 倾向
definitionEn: a general tendency in the way a situation is changing or developing
example: The current trend is towards more part-time employment.

definitionZh: n  技工， 机修工
definitionEn: someone who is skilled at repairing motor vehicles and machinery
example: a garage mechanic

definitionZh: n  革命； 巨变； 旋转
definitionEn: a complete change in ways of thinking, methods of working etc
example: the French Revolution of 1789

definitionZh: adj  可靠的， 可信赖的
definitionEn: someone or something that is reliable can be trusted or depended on
example: a birth control method that is cheap and reliable

definitionZh: n  刺激； 动机
definitionEn: something that encourages you to work harder, start a new activity etc
example: As an added incentive, there’s a bottle of champagne for the best team.

definitionZh: v  叙述， 讲述； 有关联
definitionEn: if two things relate, they are connected in some way
example: I don’t understand how the two ideas relate.

definitionZh: adj 预备的，初步的; n  初步做法， 起始行为
definitionEn: happening before something that is more important, often in order to prepare for it
example: the preliminary stages of the competition

definitionZh: n  障碍， 妨害物
definitionEn: something that makes it difficult to achieve some­thing
example: The tax puts obstacles in the way of companies trying to develop trade overseas.

definitionZh: adj  剩余的
definitionEn: remaining after all the rest has been used, taken, or eaten
example: leftover vegetables

definitionZh: adj  合作的， 协作的
definitionEn: a job or piece of work that involves two or more people working together to achieve something
example: ...a collaborative research project.

definitionZh: v  组成； 设立； 制定
definitionEn: if several people or things constitute something, they are the parts that form it
example: We must redefine what constitutes a family.

definitionZh: vt  控诉， 起诉， 控告
definitionEn: to officially charge someone with a criminal offence
example: He was later indicted on corruption charges.

definitionZh: n  送急件的人， 信使； 旅游服务员
definitionEn: A courier is a person who is paid to take letters and packages direct from one place to another
example: ...a motorcycle courier.

definitionZh: vt  使确信， 说服
definitionEn: to make someone feel certain that something is true
example: Her arguments didn’t convince everyone, but changes were made.

definitionZh: v  交配; n 配偶；朋友，伙伴；同事；大副
definitionEn: if animals mate, they have sex to produce babies; someone you work with, do an activity with, or share something with
example: Rabbits can be mated as early as six months old.

definitionZh: v 狂奔，涌向；使仓促行事; n  逃窜， 狂奔； 热潮， 风尚
definitionEn: to be made frightened or worried so that you do something too quickly, without thinking enough about it; when a group of large animals or people suddenly start running in the same direction because they are frightened or excited
example: a herd of stampeding buffalo

definitionZh: v 狼吞虎咽; n  山峡， 峡谷
definitionEn: If you gorge on something or gorge yourself on it, you eat lots of it in a very greedy way; a deep narrow valley with steep sides
example: I could spend each day gorging on chocolate.

definitionZh: v  停止， 结束
definitionEn: if something terminates, or if you terminate it, it ends
example: The court ruled that the contract must be terminated.

definitionZh: n  怪癖， 癖性； 过分的独特风格
definitionEn: Someone's mannerisms are the gestures or ways of speaking that are very characteristic of them, and which they often use
example: His mannerisms are more those of a preoccupied maths professor.

definitionZh: n  理论， 原理； 学说； 见解， 看法
definitionEn: an idea or set of ideas that is intended to explain something about life or the world, especially an idea that has not yet been proved to be true
example: Freudian theory has had a great influence on psychology.

definitionZh: n  联盟， 同盟， 联邦； 私党
definitionEn: a confederation
example: They've entered this new confederacy because the central government's been unable to control the collapsing economy.

definitionZh: vi 聚结，成群; n  群； 一群； 大量
definitionEn: if people flock to a place, they go there in large numbers because something interesting or exciting is happening there; a group of sheep, goats, or birds
example: Have you ever observed that birds of a feather flock together? In other words, people who are similar become friends or do things together.

definitionZh: n  延长； 延伸； 电话分机， 分机号码
definitionEn: the development of something in order to make it affect more people, situations, areas than before
example: Donald’s been given an extension to finish his thesis.

definitionZh: adj  内在的， 内部的； 国内的， 内政的； 内心的
definitionEn: within a particular country
example: We have no interest in interfering in the internal affairs of other countries.

definitionZh: n  性别； 性
definitionEn: the fact of being male or female
example: people of the same gender

definitionZh: adj  文学的； 文人的， 书卷气的
definitionEn: relating to literature
example: a literary prize

definitionZh: n  建筑师； 设计师， 缔造者
definitionEn: someone whose job is to design buildings
example: Tinoco was one of the architects of the government’s economic reforms.

definitionZh: vt  切除； 删去
definitionEn: to remove or get rid of something, especially by cutting it out
example: The tumour was excised.

definitionZh: vt 拳打；打孔；按，压; n  重拳击打； 冲床， 打孔机
definitionEn: to make a hole in something, using a metal tool or other sharp object; a quick strong hit made with your  fist (= closed hand )
example: The guard punched my ticket and I got on.

definitionZh: adv 横过；到对面，向对面; prep  穿过， 越过； 在对面
definitionEn: towards someone or something on the other side of an area
example: There’s Brendan. Why don’t you go across and say hello?

definitionZh: n  灵活性； 弹性， 韧性； 适应性
definitionEn: the ability to change or be changed easily to suit a different situation
example: Employees expect flexibility in the workplace.

definitionZh: n 抵押贷款，按揭；抵押证书; vt  用…作抵押
definitionEn: a legal arrangement by which you borrow money from a bank or similar organization in order to buy a house, and pay back the money over a period of years; if you mortgage your home, land, or property, you borrow money, usually from a bank, and if you cannot pay back the money within a particular period of time, the bank has the right to sell your property in order to get the money you owe it
example: Your building society or bank will help arrange a mortgage.

definitionZh: n  身份； 特征， 特性； 同一性
definitionEn: someone’s identity is their name or who they are
example: The identity of the killer is still unknown.

definitionZh: adj  联邦的； 联邦制的； 联邦政府的
definitionEn: a federal country or system of government consists of a group of states which control their own affairs, but which are also controlled by a single national government which makes decisions on foreign affairs, defence etc
example: Switzerland is a federal republic.

definitionZh: v  检验， 核实
definitionEn: to discover whether something is correct or true
example: American forces will remain to verify compliance with the treaty.

definitionZh: n  远足， 短途旅游
definitionEn: a short journey arranged so that a group of people can visit a place, especially while they are on holiday
example: a shopping excursion

definitionZh: vt  为…举行就职典礼； 为…举行开幕式； 开始， 开创
definitionEn: to hold an official ceremony when someone starts doing an important job in government
example: The Turner Prize was inaugurated in 1984.

definitionZh: n 痉挛，抽筋；; vt  阻碍， 阻止
definitionEn: a severe pain that you get in part of your body when a muscle becomes too tight, making it difficult for you to move that part of your body
example: Several players were suffering from cramp.

definitionZh: n  学会， 研究院； 专科院校
definitionEn: an official organization which encourages the development of literature, art, science etc
example: the American Academy of Arts and Letters

definitionZh: n  孤独， 单独； 独处， 独居； 隐居处
definitionEn: when you are alone, especially when this is what you enjoy
example: the solitude of her house on the lake

definitionZh: n 报答，奖赏，报酬; vt  奖赏， 奖励， 给以报酬
definitionEn: something that you get because you have done something good or helpful or have worked hard; to give something to someone because they have done something good or helpful or have worked for it
example: The school has a system of rewards and punishments to encourage good behaviour.

definitionZh: n  曲棍球
definitionEn: a game played on grass by two teams of 11 players, with sticks and a ball
example: ...a new hockey arena.

definitionZh: v 吃草；放牧；擦伤; n  擦伤
definitionEn: if an animal grazes, or if you graze it, it eats grass that is growing; a wound caused by rubbing that slightly breaks the surface of your skin
example: fields where they used to graze their sheep

definitionZh: v 吞，咽；吞没，侵吞；轻信，轻易接受；默默忍受；使不流露，抑制; n  燕子； 吞， 咽
definitionEn: to make food or drink go down your throat and towards your stomach; a small black and white bird that comes to northern countries in the summer
example: He swallowed the last of his coffee and asked for the bill.

definitionZh: n  津贴， 利益； 特权
adj  灵长目的; n 原始人类；人科动物
definitionEn: a member of a group of animals which includes human beings and also the animals from whom humans developed
example: Extinct genus of african hominid .

definitionZh: n (原子)核
definitionEn: the central part of an atom, made up of neutrons, protons, and other elementary particles
example: Neutrons and protons are bound together in the nucleus of an atom.

definitionZh: v 刺，蜇；感觉刺痛; n  尾刺； 刺痛
definitionEn: if an insect or a plant stings you, it makes a very small hole in your skin and you feel a sharp pain because of a poisonous substance; the sharp needle-shaped part of an insect’s or animal’s body, with which it stings you
example: He was stung by a bee.

definitionZh: vt 榨出汁液; n  汁， 液
definitionEn: to get the juice out of fruit or vegetables; the liquid that comes from fruit and vegetables, or a drink that is made from this
example: a carton of orange juice

definitionZh: v  赶快， 匆忙; n 急忙，急速，匆忙
definitionEn: great speed in doing something, especially because you do not have enough time
example: Spelling mistakes are often just the result of haste.

definitionZh: vt 养育，养护，培养；扶植，支持；滋长，助长; n  养育， 培养
definitionEn: to feed and take care of a child or a plant while it is growing; the education and care that you are given as a child, and the way it affects your later development and attitudes
example: plants nurtured in the greenhouse

definitionZh: v  扣紧； 变形， 弯曲; n 皮带扣环
definitionEn: to become bent or curved because of heat or pressure, or to make something bend or curve in this way; a piece of metal used for fastening the two ends of a belt, for fastening a shoe, bag etc, or for decoration
example: The steel pillars began to buckle.

definitionZh: vi  退化， 衰退; adj  堕落的； 退化的
definitionEn: to become worse; morally unacceptable
example: Inactivity can make your joints stiff, and the bones may begin to degenerate.

definitionZh: adj  破坏性的， 毁灭性的
definitionEn: causing damage to people or things
example: the destructive power of modern weapons

definitionZh: n  男修道院， 寺院
definitionEn: a place where  monk s  live
example: They found an icon in the monastery.

definitionZh: adj  虔敬的； 诚恳的
definitionEn: someone who is devout has a very strong belief in a religion
example: a devout Catholic

definitionZh: n 审查员; vt  审查， 检查
definitionEn: someone whose job is to examine books, films, letters etc and remove anything considered to be offensive, morally harmful, or politically dangerous; to examine books, films, letters etc to remove anything that is considered offensive, morally harmful, or politically dangerous etc
example: The report was cleared by the American military censors.

definitionZh: vt  狼吞虎咽地吃， 吞食； 吞没， 吞噬； 如饥似渴地读
definitionEn: to eat something quickly because you are very hungry
example: The boys devoured their pancakes.

definitionZh: v 搅拌；煽动；激发，打动；行动，活动; n  搅拌， 搅动； 激动， 震动
definitionEn: to move a liquid or substance around with a spoon or stick in order to mix it together; a feeling of excitement or annoyance
example: Stir the paint to make sure it is smooth.

definitionZh: vt  侮辱， 凌辱; n  侮辱， 凌辱
definitionEn: to offend someone by saying or doing something they think is rude; a remark or action that is offensive or deliberately rude
example: Nobody insults my family and gets away with it!

definitionZh: n  存在， 实在； 生存， 生活
definitionEn: the state of existing
example: Scientists have many theories about how the universe first came into existence (= started to exist ).

definitionZh: v  手工制作; n 手艺，工艺
definitionEn: to make something using a special skill, especially with your hands; a job or activity in which you make things with your hands, and that you usually need skill to do
example: Each doll is crafted individually by specialists.

definitionZh: n  轴； 轴线， 中心线
definitionEn: the imaginary line around which a large round object, such as the Earth, turns
example: The Earth rotates on an axis between the north and south poles.
